items.title_zh: 有道词典笔X8系列上市
items.title_en: Youdao Launches Dictionary Pen X8 Series with Subscription-Based AI Features
items.summary_zh: 36氪获悉，6月29日，网易有道正式发布新一代旗舰学习硬件——有道词典笔X8系列。该产品首次将课堂笔记实时整理、深度视频答疑等进阶AI能力以订阅服务模式推出，由用户按需解锁。
items.summary_en: On June 29, NetEase Youdao launched the new flagship learning hardware, the Youdao Dictionary Pen X8 series. It introduces advanced AI capabilities such as real-time classroom note organization and in-depth video Q&A through a subscription service model, allowing users to unlock features on demand.
items.why_zh: 这是AI教育硬件首次采用订阅制模式，可能改变智能学习设备的商业模式。
items.why_en: This marks the first subscription-based AI education hardware, potentially transforming the business model of smart learning devices.

items.title_zh: 智谱发布GLM-5.2，国产AI模型在网络安全领域实现关键突破
items.title_en: Zhipu AI Releases GLM-5.2, Achieving Key Breakthrough in Cybersecurity
items.summary_zh: 智谱发布GLM-5.2，国产AI模型在网络安全领域实现关键突破 搜狐网
items.summary_en: Zhipu AI released GLM-5.2, achieving a key breakthrough in cybersecurity. The model demonstrates strong performance in security tasks, enhancing the competitiveness of domestic AI in this field.
items.why_zh: 这表明国产AI模型在关键安全领域取得实质性进展，对国家安全和产业自主可控具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This indicates substantial progress for domestic AI models in critical security domains, crucial for national security and industrial self-reliance.

items.title_zh: OpenAI推迟GPT-5.6发布，因美国寻求提前获取AI模型
items.title_en: OpenAI delays GPT-5.6 release as US seeks early access to AI models
items.summary_zh: OpenAI推迟了GPT-5.6的发布，原因是美国政府寻求提前获取AI模型。这一延迟可能涉及监管审查或安全评估。具体新发布时间尚未公布。此举反映了AI领域日益增长的政府监管和国家安全考量。
items.summary_en: OpenAI delays GPT-5.6 release as US seeks early access to AI models Crypto Briefing
items.why_zh: 这凸显了AI模型发布与政府监管之间的紧张关系，可能影响未来AI技术的部署节奏。
items.why_en: This highlights the tension between AI model releases and government regulation, potentially impacting the pace of future AI deployment.

items.title_zh: 北京太空算力创新中心揭牌成立，统筹组织星载 AI 芯片、太空大模型等联合研发
items.title_en: Beijing Space Computing Innovation Center Launched, Focusing on Spaceborne AI Chips and Space LLMs
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 29 日消息，据《科创板日报》报道，今日在北京海淀中关村举办的全球数字经济大会太空算力论坛上， 北京太空算力创新中心正式揭牌成立 。 北京太空算力创新中心采用“公司 + 联盟”双轮驱动模式，运营主体为北京天算星联科技有限公司。创新中心承担四类核心职能： 一是共性技术攻关，围绕星载 AI 芯片、高性能算力载荷、智能卫星平台、太空大模型、天地一体云平台等关键环节统筹组织联合研发； 二是公共平台服务，建设覆盖芯片到系统的地面综合验证基础设施与天地一体测试验证环境，向产业链上下游开放共享； 三是标准制定与生态引领，主导或参与国家、行业标准研制，以开源开放理念汇聚产业生态； 四是成果转化与场景变现，统筹城市治理、行业“天数天算”、社会化 Token 化 AI 服务三类应用通路，推动太空算力规模化商业落地。 综合IT之家此前报道，今年 4 月， 业界首个太空算力产业协同平台“太空算力专业委员会”在北京成立 。同时，北京太空算力创新中心启动筹建，该中心聚焦天基 AI 芯片、太空能源及散热、星座与航天器、空天地算网协同、太空算力应用五大方向，以应用示范为牵引、人才培养为支撑，在“十五五”期间打造太空算力原生产业体系，布局建设天地一体化算力网。 国新办 4 月 21 日举行新闻发布会介绍 2026 年一季度工业和信息化发展情况。 工业和信息化部副部长张云明表示 ，下一步，工信部将引…
items.summary_en: On June 29, the Beijing Space Computing Innovation Center was officially inaugurated in Zhongguancun, Haidian. Operating under a 'company + alliance' model, it focuses on joint R&D in spaceborne AI chips, high-performance computing payloads, intelligent satellite platforms, space LLMs, and integrated space-ground cloud platforms. The center aims to commercialize space computing and build a space-ground integrated computing network.
items.why_zh: 这是中国在太空AI算力领域的重要布局，有望推动天地一体化算力网络的发展，对航天和AI产业具有战略意义。
items.why_en: This is a key move in China's space AI computing strategy, potentially advancing the space-ground integrated computing network, with strategic implications for aerospace and AI industries.

items.title_zh: “URTOPIA”完成B轮融资，融资总额超2亿元
items.title_en: URTOPIA Raises Over 200 Million RMB in Series B, Shifts to Outdoor Embodied AI
items.summary_zh: 36氪获悉，全球智能电助力自行车品牌“URTOPIA”近日已完成B轮融资，融资总额超2亿元人民币。本轮融资由Brizan Ventures与桐乡市政府产业基金领投，高秉强、Kungho Fund、光远和声等机构持续加注。本轮融资完成后，URTOPIA将继续加大在核心技术研发、全球市场拓展、供应链建设和组织能力升级方面的投入，并推动公司从智能电助力自行车品牌，向以户外具身智能和人机耦合智能运动技术为核心的公司发展。
items.summary_en: URTOPIA, a global smart e-bike brand, completed a Series B round of over 200 million RMB. Led by Brizan Ventures and Tongxiang government fund, the funds will be used for R&D, global expansion, and transitioning to an outdoor embodied AI and human-machine coupled smart sports technology company.
items.why_zh: 这表明智能出行领域正与AI深度融合，URTOPIA的转型可能引领户外智能设备的新方向。
items.why_en: This signals deep integration of AI in smart mobility; URTOPIA's pivot may lead a new direction for outdoor smart devices.

items.title_zh: 万亿智谱，建立在2.67%流通盘上的资本幻觉
items.title_en: Trillion-Yuan Zhipu AI: A Capital Illusion Built on 2.67% Free Float
items.summary_zh: 万亿智谱，建立在2.67%流通盘上的资本幻觉 搜狐网
items.summary_en: The article suggests that Zhipu AI's trillion-yuan valuation is based on a mere 2.67% free float, posing a risk of capital bubble. The high valuation may lack real trading support, warning investors of speculation in the AI sector.
items.why_zh: 这揭示了AI公司高估值背后的潜在风险，提醒市场关注资本泡沫问题。
items.why_en: This reveals potential risks behind high valuations of AI companies, reminding the market to watch for capital bubbles.

items.title_zh: 雪城大学推出专业AI学位，应对144%的需求激增
items.title_en: To meet 144% spike in demand, Syracuse launches specialized AI degrees
items.summary_zh: 为应对AI领域144%的需求激增，雪城大学推出专门的人工智能学位项目。这些学位旨在培养AI专业人才，满足行业快速增长的需求。此举反映了高等教育对AI人才市场变化的积极响应。
items.summary_en: To meet 144% spike in demand, Syracuse launches specialized AI degrees The College Fix
items.why_zh: 这表明AI人才需求急剧增长，高等教育机构正加速调整课程以匹配市场。
items.why_en: This indicates a sharp rise in AI talent demand, with higher education rapidly adapting curricula to match market needs.

items.title_zh: 昆仑芯500亿美元IPO！中国AI芯片的资本故事终于等来大幕
items.title_en: Kunlun Chip's $50 Billion IPO: The Capital Story of China's AI Chips Begins
items.summary_zh: 昆仑芯500亿美元IPO！中国AI芯片的资本故事终于等来大幕 凤凰网
items.summary_en: Kunlun Chip plans a $50 billion IPO, marking a major capital event in China's AI chip sector. The high valuation reflects market expectations but may also carry bubble risks. The listing date is yet to be announced.
items.why_zh: 这是中国AI芯片领域规模最大的IPO之一，将影响整个产业的资本格局和发展预期。
items.why_en: This is one of the largest IPOs in China's AI chip sector, likely to impact the industry's capital landscape and development expectations.

items.title_zh: 百度股价上涨7%，AI芯片子公司昆仑芯据称拟赴港IPO筹资500亿美元
items.title_en: Baidu shares jump 7% as AI chip arm Kunlunxin said to target $50 billion Hong Kong IPO
items.summary_zh: 百度股价上涨7%，此前有报道称其AI芯片子公司昆仑芯（Kunlunxin）计划在香港进行首次公开募股（IPO），目标估值高达500亿美元。这一消息提振了投资者信心，推动百度股价大幅攀升。昆仑芯是百度旗下专注于AI芯片设计的子公司，其产品广泛应用于云计算和边缘计算场景。若IPO成功，将成为近年来规模最大的科技公司上市之一，进一步巩固百度在AI硬件领域的布局。目前百度及昆仑芯尚未对此消息作出官方回应。
items.summary_en: Baidu shares jump 7% as AI chip arm Kunlunxin said to target $50 billion Hong Kong IPO CNBC
items.why_zh: 这表明百度在AI芯片领域的布局获得市场认可，可能成为其新的增长引擎。
items.why_en: This indicates market recognition of Baidu's AI chip strategy, potentially becoming a new growth driver.

items.title_zh: 迈向可靠稳健的LLM规划：基于符号反馈的迭代自优化框架
items.title_en: Towards Reliable and Robust LLM Planning: Symbolic Feedback-Driven Iterative Self-Refinement Framework
items.summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）在长时域决策任务中常产生不可行或错误的规划，这限制了其在实际应用中的可靠性。本文提出一种基于符号反馈的迭代自优化框架，通过引入外部符号系统提供的反馈信号，引导LLM逐步修正规划方案。实验表明，该方法能显著提升LLM在复杂规划任务中的鲁棒性和正确率，为构建更可靠的AI规划系统提供了新思路。该研究来自arXiv预印本，尚未经同行评审。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27757v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have attracted widespread attention from academia and industry, yet their deployment raises critical security concerns regarding robustness and reliability. Planning, a core component of intelligent behavior, remains challenging for LLMs, which often produce infeasible or incorrect solutions in long-horizon decision-making tasks due to inherent complexity. In this paper, we propose a symbolic feedback-driven iterative self-refinement framework to enhance the robustness and reliability of LLMs in long-horizon planning.…
items.why_zh: 该框架解决了LLM在复杂规划中易出错的关键问题，对提升AI决策可靠性具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This framework addresses a key weakness of LLMs in complex planning, crucial for reliable AI decision-making.

items.title_zh: Supersede：诊断并训练LLM智能体的记忆更新缺陷
items.title_en: Supersede: Diagnosing and Training the Memory-Update Gap in LLM Agents
items.summary_zh: LLM智能体在长期多会话交互中需要跟踪事实变化（如用户搬家、价格更新），但现有模型在丢弃过时信息方面存在显著缺陷。研究者在LongMemEval数据集的知识更新子集上测试发现，即使使用前沿模型（如gpt-5.4），当用有限的自维护记忆替换完整上下文时，准确率从92%骤降至77%。这表明记忆更新能力是一个独立且未解决的失败模式。该工作提出了诊断方法和训练策略，以弥合这一差距。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27472v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents operate over long, multi-session interactions in which facts change: a user moves, a price updates, a plan is revised. Acting correctly requires using the current value of a fact and discarding values that have been superseded. We isolate this ability on real conversational data and show that it is a distinct, unsolved failure. On the knowledge-update subset of LongMemEval, replacing an agent's full context with a bounded, self-maintained memory drops accuracy from 92% to 77% even on a frontier model (gpt-5.4),…
items.why_zh: 记忆更新能力是LLM智能体长期自主运行的关键，当前缺陷严重限制了其实际部署。
items.why_en: Memory update is critical for long-term autonomous LLM agents; current failures severely limit real-world deployment.

items.title_zh: 通过预注册缓解基于LLM的p-hacking：等待下一个LLM
items.title_en: Mitigating LLM-based p-Hacking by Preregistering for the Next LLM
items.summary_zh: 随着LLM被广泛用于生成和标注数据以支持下游假设检验，研究者可能通过调整提示、解码参数等操纵结果，导致p-hacking问题。本文提出一种协议：研究者预先注册实验设计和符合条件的模型，然后在预注册后第一个发布的LLM上运行实验。这样，研究者无法针对特定模型微调参数，从而减少p-hacking。该协议旨在提高LLM驱动研究的可重复性和可信度。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27687v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to generate, classify, and annotate data whose outputs feed downstream hypothesis tests. However, LLM-based research is easy to p-hack: a researcher can tune the prompts, decoding parameters, or output format until a desired result is reached. We propose a protocol to mitigate p-hacking in LLM-based research: preregistering the experiment and eligible models, and then running it on the first eligible LLM that is released after the preregistration. The researcher finalizes the procedure on curre…
items.why_zh: 该协议为LLM辅助研究的可重复性提供了重要保障，有助于维护科学诚信。
items.why_en: This protocol provides a safeguard for reproducibility in LLM-assisted research, upholding scientific integrity.

items.title_zh: 语音强调模型能否跨语言和情感泛化？
items.title_en: Do Speech Emphasis Models Generalize across Languages and Emotions?
items.summary_zh: 韵律强调在不同语言、情感和说话风格中差异显著，但现有强调检测模型大多仅在单语中性朗读语音上训练和评估。为此，研究者构建了MMEE语料库，包含7种语言、34种情感/风格类别下的10000句专业录音（14.13小时），并提供了三级感知标注。他们测试了两种最先进的架构在单语、跨语言、多语言、跨情感等场景下的表现，揭示了当前模型在泛化能力上的不足。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27717v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Prosodic emphasis varies across languages, emotions, and speaking styles, yet existing emphasis detection models are largely trained and evaluated on monolingual neutral read speech. We introduce MMEE (Multilingual Multi-Emotion Emphasis), a corpus of 10,000 professionally recorded expressive utterances (14.13 hours) across 7 languages and 34 emotion/style categories, with three-level perceptual labels (10 annotations per sample). We benchmark two state-of-the-art architectures under monolingual, cross-lingual, multilingual, cross-emotion, cros…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了语音强调模型泛化能力的瓶颈，对多语言情感计算和人机交互有重要指导意义。
items.why_en: This work exposes generalization limits of emphasis models, guiding multilingual affective computing and HCI.

items.title_zh: 先丢弃再恢复：视觉-语言-动作模型有多冗余？
items.title_en: Drop-Then-Recovery: How Redundant Are Vision-Language-Action Models?
items.summary_zh: 视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型用于指令驱动的机器人操作，但其语言骨干网络通常继承自预训练VLM，容量远超短机器人指令所需。本文通过Transformer块移除作为受控干预，提出Drop-Then-Recovery（DTR）分析协议，研究VLA模型中的架构冗余。实验表明，大量块可以被移除而性能损失极小，甚至在某些情况下恢复后性能提升。这为设计更高效的VLA模型提供了依据。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27755v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models enable instruction-driven robotic manipulation, but they inherit oversized language backbones from pretrained VLMs whose capacity far exceeds what is needed for short robotic instructions. This raises a basic question: how much of a VLA model is actually necessary for closed-loop control? In this work, we study architectural redundancy in VLA models by using transformer block removal as a controlled intervention. We introduce \textbf{Drop-Then-Recovery (DTR)}, an analysis protocol that removes selected blocks…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了VLA模型存在显著冗余，为开发轻量级、高效的机器人控制模型提供了方向。
items.why_en: This reveals significant redundancy in VLA models, guiding development of lightweight, efficient robotic control models.

items.title_zh: 参数高效混合Transformer（PEHT）：融合动态城市拥堵的网络流量预测
items.title_en: Parameter Efficient Hybrid Transformer (PEHT) for Network Traffic Prediction via Dynamic Urban Congestion Integration
items.summary_zh: 准确的网络流量预测对动态城市蜂窝网络的资源分配至关重要，但受复杂移动模式、拥堵动态和异构用户行为影响而极具挑战。本文提出参数高效混合Transformer（PEHT），将城市移动性和拥堵信息集成到Transformer架构中。PEHT分离主要网络通信特征与辅助特征，通过高效参数设计实现高精度预测，同时降低计算开销。实验表明，PEHT在多个真实数据集上优于现有方法。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.28274v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Accurate network traffic prediction is a critical element for efficient resource allocation in dynamic urban cellular networks. However, prediction remains challenging because network demand is influenced by complex mobility patterns, congestion dynamics, and heterogeneous user behavior. This paper introduces the Parameter-Efficient Hybrid Transformer (PEHT), a network traffic prediction framework that integrates urban mobility and congestion information into a Transformer-based architecture. PEHT separates primary network communication feature…
items.why_zh: 该模型通过融合城市动态信息显著提升了网络流量预测精度，对智慧城市资源调度有重要价值。
items.why_en: By incorporating urban dynamics, PEHT significantly improves traffic prediction, valuable for smart city resource allocation.

items.title_zh: 先看再动：动态3D故事世界中的叙事引导视觉注意力
items.title_en: Look-Before-Move: Narrative-Grounded World Visual Attention in Dynamic 3D Story Worlds
items.summary_zh: 在动态3D环境中，具身AI和世界模型需要主动决定观察什么，而不仅仅是被动处理输入。本文通过动态3D故事世界中的相机规划研究这一问题：相机不仅要生成平滑运动，还要在移动前决定获取哪些视觉证据。作者将这一能力定义为叙事引导的世界视觉注意力，相机作为具身观察者，根据叙事上下文确定观察目标。实验表明，该方法能生成更符合叙事逻辑的相机运动，提升故事呈现效果。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.26964v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: As embodied AI and world models increasingly operate in dynamic 3D environments, visual perception must move beyond passively interpreting given observations toward actively deciding what to observe. We study this problem through camera planning in dynamic 3D story worlds, where the camera must not only generate smooth motion, but also decide what visual evidence should be acquired before it moves. We formulate this capability as Narrative-Grounded World Visual Attention, where the camera acts as an embodied observer that determines what to o…
items.why_zh: 该研究推动了具身AI在动态环境中主动感知能力的发展，对虚拟现实和自动电影制作有重要应用。
items.why_en: This advances active perception for embodied AI in dynamic environments, with applications in VR and automated cinematography.

items.title_zh: 对齐目标问题：人类、AI系统及其设计者的道德判断分歧
items.title_en: The Alignment Target Problem: Divergent Moral Judgments of Humans, AI Systems, and Their Designers
items.summary_zh: AI对齐研究旨在使机器行为符合人类价值观，但面临一个基本问题：应该以谁的道德期望来指导AI决策？许多研究假设应以人类在相同情境下的行为作为基准，但关于“智能体类型价值分叉”的研究挑战了这一假设，表明人们对人类和AI系统的判断并不总是一致。本文进一步探讨了两种可能性：首先，当AI行为的人类起源被揭示时，对AI的评价会发生变化；其次，AI设计者的道德判断也可能与普通公众存在分歧。这些发现表明，AI对齐的目标并非单一，而是需要综合考虑多方利益相关者的价值观。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2604.24155v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The project of aligning machine behavior with human values raises a basic problem: whose moral expectations should guide AI decision-making? Much alignment research assumes that the appropriate benchmark is how humans themselves would act in a given situation. Studies of agent-type value forks challenge this assumption by showing that people do not always judge humans and AI systems identically.This paper extends that challenge by examining two further possibilities: first, that evaluations of AI behavior change when its human origins a…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了AI对齐中一个被忽视的核心问题——目标选择本身存在分歧，直接影响AI伦理决策的公平性和可接受性。
items.why_en: This research highlights a neglected core issue in AI alignment: the target itself is contested, affecting the fairness and acceptability of AI ethical decisions.

items.title_zh: 基于CTPA和病历的肺栓塞风险分层：血管图并非万能
items.title_en: Pulmonary Embolism Risk Stratification from CTPA and Medical Records: Vascular Graphs Are Not All You Need
items.summary_zh: 肺栓塞（PE）的风险分层对临床决策至关重要。现行指南依赖于患者病历、CT肺动脉造影（CTPA）参数和血液检测结果，但血液检测在常规实践中常缺失。本研究探讨了仅凭病历和CTPA影像提取的生物标志物，能否通过最先进的模型准确进行风险分层。研究人员比较了多种结合病历和心脏参数的方法，发现仅依赖影像和病历数据仍存在局限性，血管图等高级特征并非充分条件。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.25956v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Risk stratification for pulmonary embolism (PE) is critical for clinical decision-making. Stratification guidelines are based on patient medical records, parameters measured from computed tomography pulmonary angiography (CTPA), and blood tests. However, blood tests are often missing in routine practice. This work studies whether state-of-the-art models can accurately classify risk stratification from only medical records and biomarkers extracted from CTPA images. We benchmark different approaches to combine medical records and cardiac…
items.why_zh: 该研究为临床实践中血液检测缺失时的PE风险分层提供了可行方案，同时揭示了当前AI模型在医学影像分析中的局限性。
items.why_en: This study offers a potential solution for PE risk stratification when blood tests are unavailable, while revealing limitations of current AI models in medical imaging analysis.

items.title_zh: 统一零样本时间序列预测：Darts基础模型
items.title_en: Unified Zero-Shot Time Series Forecasting: A Darts Foundation
items.summary_zh: 自2020年首次发布以来，Darts已成为广泛使用的开源Python时间序列分析库。近期一系列基础模型声称在零样本预测中提升了准确性，预示着从训练定制模型向利用预训练通用预测器的范式转变。然而，这些基础模型通常以孤立的包形式发布，接口碎片化，与常用工具互操作性有限，使得在完整流程中进行联合评估和集成变得困难。本文旨在通过Darts库统一这些模型，提供标准化的接口和评估框架。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27438v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Since its initial release in 2020, Darts has become a widely used open-source Python library for time series analysis. A series of foundation models have recently claimed accuracy improvements in zero-shot forecasting, promising a paradigm shift from training custom models to harnessing pre-trained general-purpose forecasters. Foundation models, however, are often released as isolated packages with fragmented interfaces and limited interoperability with common tooling, making joint evaluation and integration within complete pipelines difficult. I…
items.why_zh: 该研究解决了时间序列基础模型碎片化问题，通过统一框架推动零样本预测的实用化和标准化。
items.why_en: This work addresses the fragmentation of time series foundation models, promoting practical and standardized zero-shot forecasting through a unified framework.

items.title_zh: 非可观测状态与受限决策时段的马尔可夫强盗学习
items.title_en: Learning in Markovian bandits with non-observable states and constrained decision epochs
items.summary_zh: 本文研究了在非可观测状态和可能受限决策时段下的马尔可夫强盗问题中的遗憾最小化。研究聚焦于“纯”遗憾基准，将学习算法的性能与最佳“纯策略”进行比较——类似于随机强盗的最优策略，即从头到尾选择最优臂而不切换。作者引入了一种广义的休息马尔可夫强盗模型——自退化马尔可夫强盗，在该模型中纯策略具有理论保证。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27448v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This paper studies the problem of regret minimization in Markovian bandits with \emph{non-observable states} and possibly \emph{constrained} decision epochs. The focus is restricted to a ``pure'' regret benchmark, that compares the performance of the learning algorithm to the best \emph{pure policy} which -- akin to optimal policies of stochastic bandits -- picks the optimal arm from start to finish without ever switching. We introduce a generalization of rested Markovian bandits, \emph{self-degrading Markovian bandits}, for which pure policies a…
items.why_zh: 该研究扩展了马尔可夫强盗理论，为非可观测状态下的在线学习提供了新的理论框架和算法保证。
items.why_en: This research extends Markovian bandit theory, providing a new theoretical framework and algorithmic guarantees for online learning with non-observable states.

items.title_zh: TA-SparseMG：基于多尺度门控的趋势感知稀疏长期时间序列预测
items.title_en: TA-SparseMG: Trend-Aware Sparse Forecasting via Multi-Scale Gating for Long-Term Time Series
items.summary_zh: 长期时间序列预测在电力需求、交通流量、气象观测和可再生能源调度等领域有广泛应用。动态变化的长期时间序列存在统计非平稳性、局部高频扰动和跨周期耦合依赖等挑战，使得轻量级模型难以平衡参数效率和预测性能。为此，本文提出了TA-SparseMG，一种轻量级跨周期预测模型，通过多尺度门控机制感知趋势，实现稀疏预测，在保持低参数量的同时提升预测精度。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27908v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Long-term time series forecasting finds extensive applications in domains such as power demand, traffic flow, meteorological observation, and renewable energy dispatch. Forecasting dynamically varying long-term time series poses inherent challenges, including statistical nonstationarity, local high-frequency disturbances, and coupled cross-period dependencies, which make it difficult for lightweight models to balance parameter efficiency and forecasting performance. To address this issue, this study presents TA-SparseMG, a lightweight cross-perio…
items.why_zh: 该模型在保持轻量级的同时有效处理了长期时间序列的复杂动态，为资源受限场景下的精准预测提供了新方案。
items.why_en: This model effectively handles complex dynamics of long-term time series while remaining lightweight, offering a new solution for accurate forecasting in resource-constrained scenarios.

items.title_zh: Kuramoto注意力：在环面上同步自注意力机制
items.title_en: Kuramoto Attention: Synchronizing Self-Attention on the Torus
items.summary_zh: Transformer模型越来越多地被用作认知和神经表征的计算模型，因此自注意力机制的工作原理引起了工程性能之外的兴趣。认知科学中有一个传统，通过振荡器同步等动态交互来建模协调、绑定和记忆；本文通过引入Kuramoto注意力层将这一机制融入自注意力，其值更新是一个同步步骤。每个token携带一组相位振荡器，其隐藏状态通过同步过程更新，从而在注意力机制中实现了动态交互。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.11585v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Transformer models are increasingly used as computational models of cognition and neural representation, so the mechanism implemented by self-attention is of interest beyond engineering performance. A complementary tradition in cognitive science models coordination, binding, and memory through dynamical interactions such as oscillator synchrony; we bring this mechanism into self-attention by introducing the Kuramoto Attention layer, whose value update is a synchronization step. Each token carries a bank of phase oscillators, so its hidden sta…
items.why_zh: 该研究将认知科学中的同步机制引入Transformer，为理解自注意力的动态过程提供了新视角，并可能提升模型的表征能力。
items.why_en: This work brings synchrony mechanisms from cognitive science into Transformers, offering new insights into the dynamics of self-attention and potentially improving representational power.

items.title_zh: 用于FMCW雷达高度计干扰抑制的时间卷积自编码器
items.title_en: Temporal Convolutional Autoencoder for Interference Mitigation in FMCW Radar Altimeters
items.summary_zh: 由于现代通信系统的带内干扰，调频连续波（FMCW）雷达高度计的可靠高度估计面临越来越大的挑战。本文提出了一种时间卷积自编码器（TCAE），直接处理同相和正交（IQ）样本，以抑制结构化干扰，同时保留用于距离估计的信号相位和频率内容。该模型在完整的雷达高度计仿真链中训练和初步评估，并进一步通过实测数据验证。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2505.22783v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Reliable altitude estimation with frequency-modulated continuous wave (FMCW) radar altimeters is increasingly a challenge due to in-band interference from modern communication systems. In this paper, we present a temporal convolutional autoencoder (TCAE) that directly processes in-phase and quadrature (IQ) samples to suppress structured interference while preserving signal phase and frequency content for range estimation. The model is trained and initially evaluated within a full radar altimeter simulation chain, then further validated…
items.why_zh: 该研究为雷达高度计在复杂电磁环境下的可靠运行提供了有效的干扰抑制方法，对航空安全具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This study provides an effective interference mitigation method for radar altimeters in complex electromagnetic environments, crucial for aviation safety.

items.title_zh: MaRS：基于马氏距离残差评分的鲁棒分布外检测
items.title_en: MaRS: Robust Out-of-Distribution Detection via Mahalanobis Residual Scoring
items.summary_zh: 基础模型为医学图像提供了高度描述性的表示，但其可靠性在患者、设备或采集条件变化导致的分布偏移下会下降。因此，可靠的分布外（OOD）检测对于安全部署至关重要。最近的基于后验的检测器有效利用了冻结的嵌入（如kNN），而基于重建的潜在特征空间OOD检测由于性能不稳定而应用有限。本文表明，这种局限性可以通过马氏距离残差评分（MaRS）克服，该方法在多个医学影像数据集上取得了优于现有方法的性能。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.22649v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Foundation models provide highly descriptive representations for medical images, yet their reliability degrades under distribution shifts arising from changes in patients, devices, or acquisition conditions. Reliable out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is therefore essential for safe deployment. Recent post-hoc detectors efficiently exploit frozen embeddings (e.g., kNN), whereas reconstruction-based OOD detection in latent feature space has seen limited adoption due to inconsistent performance. In this work, we show that the limitation…
items.why_zh: 该研究为医学影像基础模型的安全部署提供了可靠的分布外检测方法，有助于提升AI在临床中的可信度。
items.why_en: This research provides a reliable OOD detection method for medical foundation models, enhancing trustworthiness of AI in clinical settings.

items.title_zh: 嵌入模型能否反映数学等价性？新研究评估数学等价性
items.title_en: Does My Embedding Reflect That $A = B$? Evaluating Mathematical Equivalence in Embedding Models
items.summary_zh: arXiv上发布了一篇论文，研究嵌入模型是否能够捕捉数学等价性。由于数学的高度抽象性，同一陈述在不同子领域中可能呈现截然不同的形式，而许多突破性发现正是源于研究者意识到某个问题已在其他领域得到解答。随着形式化相关资源的增长，高效可靠地在数学“语言”（如从Lean到自然语言）之间导航的工具需求日益增加。该论文旨在评估当前嵌入模型在识别数学等价性方面的能力，从而推动跨领域数学知识的连接与利用。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.23959v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Because mathematics is highly abstract, a single statement can take very different forms depending on what subfield it is framed in. There are many examples where breakthroughs occurred after researchers discovered that a question had already been answered in a different field. At the same time, the growth of new resources related to formalization has increased the need for tools that enable efficient and reliable navigation between mathematical 'languages' (e.g., from Lean to natural language). In this paper, we investigate whether cur…
items.why_zh: 该研究有助于推动跨领域数学知识的发现与整合，对数学研究和形式化工具的发展具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This research helps facilitate cross-domain mathematical discovery and integration, which is significant for mathematical research and formalization tools.

items.title_zh: 月之暗面 Kimi：所有融资活动仅由公司直接负责，已发现部分机构和个人涉嫌欺诈
items.title_en: Moonshot AI Statement: All Financing Activities Directly Handled by Company, Fraud Detected
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 29 日消息，月之暗面今日发布 声明称，近期，市场上出现多起假借「 月之暗面 」（「公司」或「我司」）名义的不实融资及股权交易信息， 公司已发现部分机构和个人涉嫌欺诈 。 声明内容如下： 一、我司所有融资活动仅由公司直接负责。 我司未聘任或授权任何第三方机构作为财务顾问、融资顾问处理月之暗面的任何融资交易（包括新股交易、老股转让交易）。 二、我司的老股（含普通股、激励股权等）转让必须经我司内部批准方可进行。 凡未经我司批准发生的老股交易，一律无效，我司将拒绝予以任何形式的 确权登记 ，且保留采取一切法律手段追究转让方违约责任的权利。我司特别提示，上述转让限制不仅涵盖直接转让，亦包括通过任何形式或结构（包括但不限于「特殊目的实体 / SPV」、「上层份额」、「通道」、「代持」、「委托持股」、「收益权转让」等）的间接转让。 三、我司新股融资的额度分配，均以实际资金到账为确认依据， 未向任何机构或个人预先承诺或锁定额度，亦不会主动要求或授权任何机构出具资产证明。任何声称已锁定我司投资份额、出示所谓 " 公司盖章确保份额 " 文件，或以我司名义要求提供资产证明的行为，均属虚假或欺诈，我司对此概不负责。 IT之家注意到，该公司表示，对于任何未经授权擅自发布月之暗面股权交易信息的机构和个人，公司保留采取一切法律手段追究其民事及刑事责任的权利。
items.summary_en: Moonshot AI (Kimi) issued a statement regarding fraudulent financing and equity transaction information circulating in the market. The company clarified that all financing activities are handled directly by the company, and no third party is authorized. Unauthorized share transfers are invalid, and the company reserves the right to take legal action.
items.why_zh: 该声明旨在保护公司及投资者权益，防止欺诈行为损害公司声誉和融资秩序。
items.why_en: This statement aims to protect the company and investor interests, preventing fraud that could harm the company's reputation and financing order.

items.title_zh: 月之暗面声明：未授权任何第三方处理融资交易
items.title_en: Moonshot AI: No Third Party Authorized for Financing Transactions
items.summary_zh: 36氪获悉，月之暗面今日发布严正声明称，近期市场上出现多起假借公司名义传播的不实融资及股权交易信息，部分机构和个人已涉嫌欺诈。月之暗面表示，所有融资活动由公司直接负责，未聘任或授权任何第三方机构作为财务顾问、融资顾问处理任何融资交易，包括新股交易和老股转让交易。公司老股（含普通股、激励股权等）转让必须经内部批准方可进行，未经批准的老股交易一律无效，将拒绝予以任何形式的确权登记，并保留采取一切法律手段追究转让方违约责任的权利。
items.summary_en: Moonshot AI issued a statement denying any authorization of third parties for financing transactions. The company emphasized that all financing activities are handled directly, and unauthorized share transfers are invalid. Legal action will be taken against fraudulent activities.
items.why_zh: 该声明有助于澄清市场传闻，维护公司融资活动的合法性和透明度。
items.why_en: This statement helps clarify market rumors and maintain the legality and transparency of the company's financing activities.

items.title_zh: 36氪首发 | URTOPIA联创做了款智能指环，众筹已破千万元
items.title_en: AI Wearable Brand AIVELA Raises Millions in Seed Round, Launches Smart Ring
items.summary_zh: 作者 | 张子怡 编辑 | 袁斯来 近日，AI可穿戴品牌AIVELA宣布完成数百万美元首轮融资。本轮融资由线性资本领投，锋领资本跟投，智能电助力自行车品牌URTOPIA等产业方共同加注。 本轮融资将主要用于下一代AI可穿戴产品研发、健康数据与AI Agent能力建设、全球市场拓展以及核心团队扩张。AIVELA将以智能指环、智能手链等贴身可穿戴产品为起点，面向全球市场构筑融合健康感知、自然交互与AI健康服务的新一代消费科技品牌。 当前，消费者的健康需求正从单纯的运动记录，逐渐向睡眠、压力管理等长期的身体状态监测转移，在海外市场，已经跑出Oura和Whoop两家估值超百亿美元的头部企业，分别主打长期的医疗级健康监测和硬核的体能训练指导。 研究机构Precedence Research预测，到2034年，全球智能可穿戴市场的整体规模将超过4300亿美元，复合年增长率（CAGR）约为20%。 在连续创业过程中，AIVELA创始人兼CEO李东豪曾因高压工作节奏产生严重睡眠问题，并因此成为智能指环的早期用户。这段经历成为他创业契机。 在使用智能戒指的过程中，李东豪意识到，健康并不只是运动能力的提升，也包括睡眠、恢复、压力管理和长期生活节奏的平衡。运动和恢复如同一体两面，只有把二者结合起来，用户才可能真正实现长期健康目标。 AIVELA首款智能指环产品AIVELA Ring Pro于2025年登…
items.summary_en: AI wearable brand AIVELA completed a multi-million dollar seed round led by Linear Capital. The funds will be used for R&D, health data and AI agent capabilities, global expansion, and team growth. AIVELA's first smart ring product, AIVELA Ring Pro, launched on a crowdfunding platform in 2025 and has raised over 10 million yuan.
items.why_zh: AIVELA的融资和产品发布表明AI可穿戴设备市场持续增长，健康监测需求从运动记录向长期状态管理转变。
items.why_en: AIVELA's funding and product launch indicate the growing AI wearable market, with health monitoring shifting from activity tracking to long-term status management.

items.title_zh: 36氪首发 | Ebike公司获Brizan Ventures、高秉强参与超数亿融资，要进军外骨骼市场
items.title_en: Smart E-bike Brand URTOPIA Raises Over 200 Million Yuan in Series B, Plans Exoskeleton Expansion
items.summary_zh: 作者 | 张子怡 编辑 | 袁斯来 硬氪获悉，全球智能电助力自行车品牌「URTOPIA」近日已完成B轮融资，融资总额超2亿元人民币。本轮融资由Brizan Ventures与桐乡市政府产业基金领投，高秉强、Kungho Fund、光远和声等机构持续加注。 本轮融资完成后，URTOPIA将继续加大在核心技术研发、全球市场拓展、供应链建设和组织能力升级方面的投入，并推动公司从智能电助力自行车品牌，向以户外具身智能和人机耦合智能运动技术为核心的公司发展。 在URTOPIA的长期规划中，智能E-bike并不是其业务的终点，而是其拓展“户外具身智能”领域的切入点。 在URTOPIA创始人兼CEO张波看来，相较于传统的两轮出行工具，智能E-bike由于集成了电机、电池、传感器和微控制单元，天然具备与骑行者身体及外部环境进行实时交互的基础条件。而公司的核心技术并不止于单一的电机或电控系统，而是一套完整的人机耦合系统，也是户外具身智能在运动场景中的关键技术基础。 所谓“具身智能”，是指智能系统不仅存在于虚拟的云端或屏幕内，而是拥有物理实体，能够通过传感器感知物理世界的物理规律，并通过执行机构对外部环境做出实时反馈。 在户外运动场景中，E-bike作为承载人体运动的设备，能够直接获取骑行者的踏频、踏力、心率等身体指标，同时通过车端传感器收集地形、坡度、风阻等环境数据。通过对这些多源数据的实时处理，系…
items.summary_en: URTOPIA, a global smart e-bike brand, completed a Series B round of over 200 million yuan. The funds will be used for R&D, global expansion, and supply chain. The company plans to evolve from an e-bike brand to one focused on outdoor embodied intelligence and human-machine coupling technology.
items.why_zh: URTOPIA的融资和战略转型反映了智能出行与具身智能融合的趋势，外骨骼市场成为新方向。
items.why_en: URTOPIA's funding and strategic shift reflect the trend of integrating smart mobility with embodied intelligence, with the exoskeleton market as a new direction.

items.title_zh: 秋声 | 海光芯正IPO背后，卖铲生意为何越做越亏？
items.title_en: Haiguang Xinzheng IPO: Optical Module Business Has Only 9% Gross Margin, Negative Operating Cash Flow
items.summary_zh: 本文约2500字，建议阅读5分钟 作者 | 彭孝秋 编者按： AI大爆发之际，越来越多公司走向资本市场。每一份招股书翻动的声音里，都藏着一家公司想说与未曾明说的全部。 鉴于此，硬氪特推出「秋声」专栏。秋声取自欧阳修《秋声赋》，借“听秋声”之意，产业冷暖，辨公司成色，记录企业冲刺IPO途中那些被写下与被隐藏的真实。这是我们第四期，海光芯正。 6月29日，北京海光芯正（01191.HK）正式在港交所敲钟上市，此次IPO招股价114港元，每手50股、入场费5757.48港元。按发售价计，公司市值约102.08亿港元，募资净额约14.15亿港元。 开盘涨74.56%，报199港元，市值178亿港元。 海光芯正是一家光电互连产品提供商，主要提供光模块、AOC（有源光缆）、AEC（有源电缆），产品广泛应用于AI数据中心，以支持高速、高密度和高能效的数据传输。在这轮AI算力军备竞赛里，光模块是卖铲子的好生意：A股的“易中天”（中际旭创、新易盛、天孚通信）两年涨出近2万亿市值，是这波行情的领头羊。 海光芯正的“硅光子”——把光器件和电子集成在一块硅芯片上，被业界视为下一代光互连方向。其招股书也称具备“从芯片设计到光模块制造”的端到端能力。听上去，海光芯正是个含着金钥匙的硬科技标的。 但硬氪翻完421页招股书后发现，海光芯正故事远比"硅光第一股"复杂得多：收入两年翻了近7倍、毛利率却只有9%、经营现…
items.summary_en: Haiguang Xinzheng listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange with an issue price of HK$114. Despite revenue growing nearly 7 times in two years, its gross margin is only 9% and operating cash flow is negative. The company is positioned as the 'first silicon photonics stock' but faces profitability challenges.
items.why_zh: 海光芯正的IPO揭示了AI算力产业链中光模块环节的激烈竞争和低毛利现状，对投资者具有警示意义。
items.why_en: Haiguang Xinzheng's IPO highlights the intense competition and low margins in the optical module segment of the AI computing chain, serving as a caution for investors.

items.title_zh: “硅仙人”吉姆 · 凯勒回复旗下公司 Tenstorrent 收购传闻：已与英特尔、高通 CEO 会面
items.title_en: Jim Keller Responds to Tenstorrent Acquisition Rumors: Met with Intel and Qualcomm CEOs
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 29 日消息，“硅仙人”吉姆 · 凯勒（Jim Keller）上周（6 月 25 日）接受《EE Times》采访，谈及旗下公司 Tenstorrent 的收购传闻。 吉姆 · 凯勒首先谈到了竞争对手 Cerebras。该公司最近完成 IPO，并宣称其 WSE-CS3 系统可以接近 1000 Tokens/s 的速度推理 Kimi K2.6（1 万亿参数）模型。 吉姆表示，自己并不在意 Cerebras 上市成功。他认为：“Cerebras 上市对我们来说反而是好事，因为我们将全面击败他们”。 谈到近期的收购传闻时，吉姆虽然没有直接回应传闻是否属实，但他确认：“ 我已经和英特尔和高通两家公司的 CEO 会面，希望和他们中的一家达成重大合作 ，因为我们的 RISC-V CPU IP 非常优秀”。 此外他还透露，目前有一家超大规模云服务商正在评估 Tenstorrent 的 AI IP，用于开发一款小型 AI 芯片。 IT之家注：Tenstorrent 成立于 2016 年，主要开发用于 AI 模型训练与 AI 应用推理的加速器芯片。而吉姆 · 凯勒在半导体行业拥有极高知名度，曾担任苹果芯片设计师，也曾负责特斯拉自动驾驶芯片开发，被视为业内代表性芯片架构专家之一。
items.summary_en: Jim Keller confirmed meeting with Intel and Qualcomm CEOs regarding potential cooperation, citing Tenstorrent's excellent RISC-V CPU IP. He also revealed that a hyperscaler is evaluating Tenstorrent's AI IP for a small AI chip. Keller dismissed competitor Cerebras's IPO, claiming Tenstorrent will beat them.
items.why_zh: 吉姆·凯勒的言论表明Tenstorrent在AI芯片领域的竞争力，以及RISC-V架构在AI市场中的潜力。
items.why_en: Jim Keller's comments indicate Tenstorrent's competitiveness in AI chips and the potential of RISC-V architecture in the AI market.

items.title_zh: OPPO Reno16「半夏青」7 月 3 日新色上市：天玑 8550 SUPER 处理器，3499 元起
items.title_en: OPPO Reno16 'Summer Green' New Color Launches July 3: Dimensity 8550 SUPER, Starting at 3,499 Yuan
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 29 日消息，今日，OPPO 宣布 OPPO Reno16 联名非人哉漫画限定柄图公开，「半夏青」新色 7 月 3 日上市。 IT之家注意到，OPPO Reno16 于今年 5 月发布， 售价 3499 元起 ，国补价 2999 元起。外观方面，OPPO Reno16 首发提供怦然星动、星河紫、月夜黑 3 款配色。 该机配备 6.32 英寸 2640×1216 OLED 直屏， 首发搭载联发科天玑 8550 SUPER 处理器 ，辅以 LPDDR5X 内存 +UFS 3.1 闪存，搭载 OPPO 山海通信增强芯片 + 独立 Wi-Fi 加速芯片，采用纳米冰晶散热。搭载 6700mAh 冰川电池，支持 80W 快充，后置 2 亿像素超清四摄。 OPPO Reno16 系列搭载 AI 键，支持 OPPO AI 一键闪记，能实现在任意场景下快速提取屏幕内容、生成旅行攻略、整理学习笔记等操作。 京东 OPPO Reno16 3499 元起 直达链接
items.summary_en: OPPO announced the new 'Summer Green' color for the Reno16, launching July 3. The phone features a 6.32-inch OLED display, Dimensity 8550 SUPER processor, 6700mAh battery with 80W charging, and a 200MP quad camera. It includes an AI button for quick screen content extraction and note-taking.
items.why_zh: OPPO Reno16新色上市结合AI功能，展示了智能手机在AI应用方面的持续创新。
items.why_en: The new color launch of OPPO Reno16 with AI features demonstrates ongoing innovation in smartphone AI applications.

items.title_zh: 破解代码迁移难题，国产“异算方舟”全栈计算平台发布
items.title_en: China's 'Yisuan Ark' Full-Stack Computing Platform Launched to Solve Code Migration Challenges
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 29 日消息，据央视新闻报道，由中国科学院计算机网络信息中心等单位联合研发的 “异算方舟”国产计算系统软件生态全栈平台 今日正式上线。 该平台聚焦国产算力下软件适配难、代码迁移难、科研操作烦琐等痛点，为科学计算软件生态建设提供一体化解决方案。 据了解，目前我国国产算力硬件已实现快速突破，但软件生态仍存在短板。例如，一些代码难以适配国产设备、底层算法运行效率低、工程仿真操作复杂等，大量优质科研成果无法在国产算力设备上落地应用，制约了科研与工程研发效率。 针对这些问题，我国科研团队打造的“异算方舟”国产计算系统软件生态全栈平台构建了三层核心能力， 形成完整的国产算力应用闭环 。 IT之家从报道获悉，平台底层搭载“九衍枢算法库”，汇集 16 款高性能计算工具， 全面适配国产算力架构，核心运算性能可实现十倍以上提速 ，筑牢算力运行根基。 平台代码转换大模型 BoundX 可自动适配多种国产算力环境，替代烦琐的人工改写工作，大幅降低技术迁移门槛， 助力各类成熟软件和存量科研代码快速落地国产算力平台 。 该平台的发布，实现了算法、代码、应用的全链条打通，让国产算力从硬件领先走向软硬件协同成熟，助力我国搭建自主可控、高效易用的国产科学计算生态。
items.summary_en: The 'Yisuan Ark' platform, jointly developed by the Computer Network Information Center of the Chinese Academy of Sciences and other units, was officially launched on June 29. It addresses challenges in software adaptation, code migration, and complex research operations for domestic computing power, offering an integrated solution with a tenfold performance boost and an AI model for automatic code conversion.
items.why_zh: 该平台填补了国产算力软件生态的短板，推动国产算力从硬件领先走向软硬件协同成熟。
items.why_en: This platform fills the gap in the software ecosystem for domestic computing power, advancing it from hardware leadership to coordinated hardware-software maturity.

items.title_zh: 上汽荣威家越 07 大五座 SUV 新车色首发：灵感来自“地壳美学”，预计第三季度发布
items.title_en: SAIC Roewe Jiayue 07 SUV Debuts New Colors, Deeply Integrates AI Large Model
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 29 日消息，上汽荣威今日首发了家越 07 大五座 SUV 新车色， 宣称灵感来自“地壳美学” ，目前已公布六款车色。 西伯利亚的紫龙晶，化作「龙晶紫」 玛瑙的温润柔光，晕染为「玛瑙灰」 海蓝宝石的清澈，流淌成「宝石蓝」 大溪地的黑珍珠，凝为「珍溪黑」 钻石的绚烂火彩，定格作「钻石白」 翡翠的庄重沉稳，落笔成「翡翠绿」 据IT之家此前报道，上汽荣威家越 07 大五座 SUV 是由上汽荣威与火山引擎深度合作的“全新 AI 原生序列”首款车型， 预计将于今年三季度发布 。 该车采用以建筑式双垂直设计，车头和车尾近 90 度垂直角设计，强化车身视觉支撑力与规整秩序感。前脸搭载行业首发一体式贯穿大灯，搭载近 3000 颗错落分布的浮雕星芒。车身采用半隐藏式门把手，配备驾驶辅助小蓝灯。 IT之家参考此前官方预热，该车深度融合火山引擎豆包大模型 2.0 系列：使 AI 大模型首次深度接入实体汽车，实现对物理设备的调度、决策与执行，标志着 AI 从“互联网场景”向“物联网场景”的关键跨越，汽车由此成为行走在现实世界中最具代表性的具身智能终端。 动力方面，新车搭载 1.5L 汽油增程发动机，型号为 15FMC ，由上海汽车集团股份有限公司生产，排量 1498ml，功率为 72kW，发动机最大净功率为 70kW；驱动电机额定功率 60kW，峰值功率 162kW。储能装置为磷酸铁锂电…
items.summary_en: SAIC Roewe unveiled new colors for its Jiayue 07 SUV, inspired by 'crust aesthetics'. This is the first model of a new AI-native series co-developed with Volcengine, integrating the Doubao large model 2.0 for the first time in a physical vehicle, enabling AI to schedule, decide, and execute in IoT scenarios. The car is expected to launch in Q3 this year.
items.why_zh: 该车是AI大模型首次深度接入实体汽车，标志着AI从互联网向物联网场景的关键跨越。
items.why_en: This vehicle marks the first deep integration of an AI large model into a physical car, representing a key transition of AI from internet to IoT scenarios.

items.title_zh: GPT-5.6正式亮相；DeepSeeK发布DSpark；阿里计划70-90亿出售游戏业务；OpenAI发布首款AI芯片；GTA6开启预购
items.title_en: GPT-5.6 Debuts; DeepSeek Releases DSpark; Alibaba Plans to Sell Gaming Business; OpenAI Unveils First AI Chip; GTA6 Pre-orders Open
items.summary_zh: GPT-5.6正式亮相；DeepSeeK发布DSpark；阿里计划70-90亿出售游戏业务；OpenAI发布首款AI芯片；GTA6开启预购 搜狐网
items.summary_en: According to Sohu, GPT-5.6 has been officially unveiled, DeepSeek released DSpark, Alibaba plans to sell its gaming business for $7-9 billion, OpenAI launched its first AI chip, and GTA6 pre-orders have started. These events span AI model upgrades, open-source frameworks, corporate strategy, hardware innovation, and gaming.
items.why_zh: 这些事件集中反映了AI、芯片、游戏等多个领域的重大进展，影响行业格局。
items.why_en: These events reflect major progress across AI, chips, and gaming, impacting industry landscapes.

items.title_zh: 消息称高德内测 Vibe Coding 产品“袋马”：自然语言一键生成微信小程序或 iOS 原生 App
items.title_en: AutoNavi Tests 'Daima' Vibe Coding Product for Generating Mini Programs and iOS Apps via Natural Language
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 29 日消息，据《读佳》今日消息，高德正在内测一款 Vibe Coding 产品“袋马”，主打自然语言驱动零门槛构建应用， 聚焦微信小程序与 iOS 原生应用场景 ， 能快速生成可直接上线 、 真机可用的应用产品 。 据介绍，这款产品面向无专业研发团队、具备产品落地想法的个人从业者与中小主体，能够降低应用开发的技术门槛。用户无需掌握编程知识、专业开发环境，仅通过自然语言描述功能或需求，就能生成完整的、可使用的 App，打破传统应用开发依赖专业团队、耗时数周的行业模式。 场景方面， 袋马主打微信小程序开发 ， 同时兼容苹果 iOS 原生应用生成 ，覆盖多端轻量化需求。产品支持轻量化迭代优化，用户生成 App 后可获取真机体验二维码，直接在微信端打开测试，之后通过自然语言提出修改需求，由 AI 自动重构、迭代，操作流程较为简洁。 此外，这款产品将主要服务企业主、独立创作者及小团队，适配轻量化、低成本、高效率的个人及小微业务应用开发场景。截至目前， 高德官方暂未披露该产品上线时间 、行业合作模式及商业化细则。 IT之家注：Vibe Coding（氛围编程）是指用 AI 辅助的编程模式。用户可通过提示词描述要处理的问题，然后提供给软件开发专用大语言模型。在这种工作流中，程序员的工作从原来的撰写代码，改为指导 AI 产出代码、测试及优化代码。
items.summary_en: AutoNavi is internally testing 'Daima', a Vibe Coding product that allows users to generate WeChat mini programs and iOS native apps using natural language, without coding knowledge. It targets individual creators and small teams, enabling rapid iteration and testing via QR codes. The launch date and business model have not been disclosed.
items.why_zh: 该产品大幅降低了应用开发的技术门槛，使非技术人员也能快速构建应用，可能改变传统开发模式。
items.why_en: This product significantly lowers the technical barrier for app development, enabling non-technical users to quickly build apps, potentially transforming traditional development models.

items.title_zh: 澳企 Firmus 将为印尼峇淡 360MW AI 工厂导入 17 万颗 NVIDIA GPU
items.title_en: Australian Firm Firmus to Deploy 170,000 NVIDIA GPUs in Indonesian AI Factory
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 29 日消息，澳大利亚 Neocloud（新兴 AI 云服务供应商）Firmus 近日宣布，该企业将在印度尼西亚峇淡（巴淡）建设一座由 NVIDIA（英伟达）芯片驱动的 NVIDIA DSX 液冷 AI 工厂。 该 AI 工厂由 Firmus 与 DayOne 合作开发， 电力容量达 360MW 。根据 Firmus 与 NVIDIA 达成的一份持续至 2034 年的战略合作，NVIDIA 将在明后两年向 Firmus 交付覆盖 Grace Blackwell、Vera Rubin、Vera 的多代算力硬件， 总计 17 万颗 GPU 。 Firmus 预计，其在合作的前六年内将从已承诺的承购协议中 获得 250~300 亿美元的收入 （IT之家注：现汇率约合 1700.93 ~ 2041.12 亿元人民币）。NVIDIA 也是 Firmus 今年四月股权融资的有条件参与方。
items.summary_en: Australian Neocloud provider Firmus will build a 360MW liquid-cooled AI factory in Batam, Indonesia, powered by 170,000 NVIDIA GPUs across multiple generations (Grace Blackwell, Vera Rubin, Vera) delivered by 2026-2027. Firmus expects $25-30 billion in revenue from offtake agreements over the first six years.
items.why_zh: 该项目展示了AI基础设施的大规模投资，以及NVIDIA在AI算力市场的持续主导地位。
items.why_en: This project highlights massive investment in AI infrastructure and NVIDIA's continued dominance in the AI computing market.

items.title_zh: 算力提速关键突破：北大与 DeepSeek 联合开源大模型推理框架 DSpark
items.title_en: Peking University and DeepSeek Jointly Open-Source Large Model Inference Framework DSpark
items.summary_zh: 算力提速关键突破：北大与 DeepSeek 联合开源大模型推理框架 DSpark article.9466.com
items.summary_en: Peking University and DeepSeek have jointly open-sourced the DSpark inference framework for large models, aiming to improve inference efficiency and reduce deployment costs.
items.why_zh: DSpark的开源有助于推动大模型推理技术的进步，降低行业应用门槛。
items.why_en: The open-sourcing of DSpark advances large model inference technology and lowers the barrier for industry adoption.

items.title_zh: 北大与DeepSeek联合开源DSpark 提升大模型推理效率
items.title_en: Peking University and DeepSeek Open-Source DSpark to Boost Large Model Inference Efficiency
items.summary_zh: 北大与DeepSeek联合开源DSpark 提升大模型推理效率 中华网
items.summary_en: Peking University and DeepSeek have open-sourced DSpark, a framework designed to enhance the inference efficiency of large models, reducing computational costs and enabling broader real-world applications.
items.why_zh: DSpark通过提升推理效率，有助于降低大模型的使用成本，加速AI应用落地。
items.why_en: By improving inference efficiency, DSpark reduces the cost of using large models and accelerates AI deployment.

items.title_zh: 《中国开源发展深度报告（2025）》发布：全球活跃开源项目总量接近 6000 万个，中国同比增长 40.58%
items.title_en: China Open Source Development Report 2025: Global Active Open Source Projects Near 60 Million, China Up 40.58% YoY
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 29 日消息，6 月 26 日，开放原子开源基金会正式发布《中国开源发展深度报告（2025）》，报告由开放原子开源基金会秘书处牵头编制。 IT之家从报告获悉，2025 年， 全球开源生态进入新一轮加速扩张期 。开源贡献量、活跃项目数量、活跃开发者规模和重点技术领域代码贡献均保持增长。开源进一步演进为全球数字创新、产业升级和技术竞争的重要基础设施。特别是人工智能快速发展，正在重塑全球开源生态的增长动力、区域格局和竞争逻辑。 从贡献规模看，全球开源进入“高基数再加速”阶段。2025 年，全球 Top30 国家和地区开源贡献总量达到 6.25 亿次，同比增长 27.59%，增速连续三年提升。 从协作网络看，全球开源正在由“单向流动”走向“多向连接”。2025 年，全球 Top30 国家和地区开源进出口贡献量达到 3439.60 万次。美国和欧盟仍是全球开源协作网络的核心支点，但不同国家和地区的功能定位正在分化。 中国开源进出口贡献量达到 166.06 万次，同比增长 11.44% ，其中出口贡献量上升、进口贡献量下降，对外输出特征更加明显。 从项目供给看，全球活跃开源项目持续扩容，亚洲增长梯队加速形成。 2025 年，全球活跃开源项目总量接近 6000 万个 ，全球 Top30 国家和地区活跃开源项目达到 4483.33 万个，同比增长 29.00%。其中，印度活跃开源…
items.summary_en: The OpenAtom Foundation released the China Open Source Development Report 2025, showing global active open source projects nearing 60 million, with China's contributions growing 40.58% YoY. China's open source export contributions increased while imports declined, indicating stronger outward output. AI is reshaping the growth dynamics of the global open source ecosystem.
items.why_zh: 该报告揭示了全球开源生态的加速扩张和中国在开源领域的快速崛起，凸显了开源在数字创新中的基础设施作用。
items.why_en: The report reveals the accelerated expansion of the global open source ecosystem and China's rapid rise, highlighting open source's role as digital innovation infrastructure.

items.title_zh: 港大教授李弘扬创业做通用全身具身大脑，获真格高榕IDG五源等数亿种子轮融资｜硬氪独家
items.title_en: HKU Professor Li Hongyang Founds Whole-Body Embodied AI Startup, Raises Hundreds of Millions in Seed Funding
items.summary_zh: 作者｜黄楠 编辑｜袁斯来 硬氪独家获悉，通用全身具身大脑公司「源策未来Archon Robotics」近日完成数亿元种子轮融资，本轮投资方包括真格基金、高榕创投、IDG资本、五源资本等头部美元基金，以及戈壁创投与香港大学联名基金、奇绩创投、上海创智学院等。光源资本担任独家财务顾问。 本轮资金将主要用于全身人形基础模型研发、多模态全身动作数据采集、人才团队扩充，以及多地研发中心与产业合作生态搭建，加速在今年内实现开源人形基座模型落地。 源策未来成立于2026年4月，研发总部位于上海市徐汇区漕河泾开发区。公司专注研发通用全身人形基座模型，构建全身智能（Whole-body Intelligence），为人形机器人提供类人全身移动操作的能力，以加快实现具身智能走入千家万户。 创始人李弘扬博士现任香港大学助理教授、计算与数据科学学院助理院长、上海创智学院导师。他主导的端到端自动驾驶项目UniAD获CVPR 2023最佳论文，是近十年来大陆学术机构唯一获此奖项的工作；2026年获机器人领域国际顶会RSS Early Career Award，成为这一奖项设立20年来的首位华人学者。 联合创始人兼CEO李天羽博士，为上海创智学院首批毕业生、复旦大学博士，作为核心开发者深度参与华为量产自动驾驶ADS 4.0世界引擎方案研发。联合创始人兼Head of AI陈立博士是UniAD最佳论文的第一作者，…
items.summary_en: Archon Robotics, a whole-body embodied AI startup founded by HKU professor Li Hongyang, has completed a seed round of hundreds of millions of yuan from top VCs including ZhenFund, Gaorong, IDG, and 5Y Capital. The funds will be used to develop a general-purpose humanoid foundation model and build a whole-body intelligence ecosystem. The company aims to open-source its humanoid base model within this year.
items.why_zh: 这是具身智能领域又一重大创业项目，由顶尖学者领衔，获多家头部机构投资，有望加速人形机器人通用大脑的研发与开源。
items.why_en: This is a major embodied AI venture led by a top academic, backed by leading investors, potentially accelerating the development and open-sourcing of a general-purpose humanoid brain.

items.title_zh: 曝某知名 AR 手游数据竟被用于军事目的，国安部门重点提示三种风险
items.title_en: AR Game Data Reportedly Used for Military Purposes; National Security Warns of Three Risks
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 29 日消息，国家安全部今天发布安全提示文章，近期，有外媒披露， 某知名 AR 手游旗下人工智能公司获取了游戏用户上传的近 300 亿份环境扫描数据 ，可能将这些数据用于训练能识别和理解物理空间的人工智能模型。由于该人工智能公司与某国军工有合作关系， 相关模型可能被用于军事目的 。该报道引起了全世界对“民用数据军事化应用”的担忧，也为数智时代的数据安全问题再次敲响了警钟。 图源：Pixabay AR（增强现实）技术，通过将虚拟信息叠加到真实场景中，可以让用户获得虚实融合的交互体验。上文提到的游戏名义上是依托 AR 实景交互的“增强现实互动”， 实质上则是诱导玩家完成精确的三维点云扫描，实时采集地理信息数据 。 采集维度远超常规拍照 。AR 技术通过多传感器融合，可一并捕捉视觉纹理、空间深度及物体尺寸，甚至能复现局部三维空间，采集信息量远超普通照片。 采集过程极具隐蔽性 。安装软件时，面对内容繁琐的使用协议，用户往往会选择“一键同意”，不细看就授予软件诸多重要权限。相关软件会持续采集信息并实时上传，而用户却难以察觉数据的具体流向。 坐标绑定精度超乎想象 。每一帧 AR 画面都强制捆绑高精度 GPS 坐标、海拔高度、设备朝向及时间戳等信息。这枚“时空胶囊”式的数据结构，能精准复现拍摄者的行动轨迹与观察视角，为后续分析提供绝对基准。 近年来曝光的一系列案例表明，游戏数据…
items.summary_en: China's Ministry of State Security warned that a popular AR game's AI company has collected nearly 30 billion environmental scans from users, potentially used to train AI models for military purposes due to ties with a country's defense industry. The game covertly captures precise 3D point cloud data with high-accuracy GPS and timestamps, raising concerns about militarization of civilian data.
items.why_zh: 该事件揭示了民用数据被军事化利用的严重风险，提醒公众和监管机构关注AR游戏等应用的数据安全与隐私保护。
items.why_en: This incident highlights the serious risk of militarizing civilian data, urging public and regulators to focus on data security and privacy in AR games and similar apps.

items.title_zh: 惠普与OpenAI启动前沿战略合作
items.title_en: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
items.summary_zh: 惠普公司宣布与OpenAI建立前沿战略合作伙伴关系。双方将共同探索AI技术在打印、个人计算及企业解决方案中的创新应用。具体合作细节尚未披露，但此举标志着传统硬件巨头与领先AI研究机构的深度联手，有望推动AI在办公和消费场景的落地。
items.summary_en: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI OpenAI
items.why_zh: 惠普与OpenAI的合作表明传统硬件企业正加速拥抱AI，可能催生新一代智能办公与消费产品。
items.why_en: The HP-OpenAI partnership signals traditional hardware companies are rapidly embracing AI, potentially spawning new intelligent office and consumer products.

items.title_zh: WIRobotics启动物理AI开发生态建设，首发ALLEX仿真模型
items.title_en: WIRobotics Begins Building a Physical AI Development Ecosystem: The First Technology Release Features the ALLEX Simulation Model
items.summary_zh: WIRobotics宣布启动物理AI开发生态系统建设，并首次发布ALLEX仿真模型。该模型旨在为机器人提供高保真物理仿真环境，加速具身智能算法的研发与测试。此举有望降低机器人开发门槛，推动物理AI领域的创新。
items.summary_en: WIRobotics Begins Building a Physical AI Development Ecosystem: The First Technology Release Features the ALLEX Simulation Model PR Newswire
items.why_zh: WIRobotics的仿真模型发布是物理AI生态建设的重要一步，有助于降低机器人研发成本，加速具身智能落地。
items.why_en: The release of the ALLEX simulation model is a key step in building the physical AI ecosystem, potentially reducing robotics R&D costs and accelerating embodied AI deployment.

items.title_zh: 惠普与OpenAI建立前沿战略合作伙伴关系，推动客户体验与内部运营转型
items.title_en: HP Inc. Launches Frontier Strategic Partnership with OpenAI to Fuel Customer-Facing Experiences and Transform Internal Operations
items.summary_zh: 惠普公司宣布与OpenAI建立前沿战略合作伙伴关系，旨在利用人工智能技术提升客户体验并优化内部运营。此次合作将整合OpenAI的先进AI模型，如GPT系列，到惠普的产品和服务中，从而为客户提供更智能、更个性化的交互体验。同时，惠普计划通过AI自动化内部流程，提高效率并降低成本。这一举措标志着惠普在AI领域的重大投入，预计将加速其数字化转型进程。
items.summary_en: HP Inc. Launches Frontier Strategic Partnership with OpenAI to Fuel Customer-Facing Experiences and Transform Internal Operations The Malone Telegram
items.why_zh: 惠普与OpenAI的合作标志着传统硬件巨头在AI领域的重大布局，可能重塑客户服务与内部运营模式。
items.why_en: This partnership signifies a major AI investment by a traditional hardware giant, potentially reshaping customer service and internal operations.

items.title_zh: 8点1氪丨两大存储巨头今日发布大规模投资计划；江淮汽车股价腰斩，章建平9日套现近3亿元；Anthropic Fable 5有望很快恢复访问
items.title_en: Memory Giants Announce Massive Investment Plans; JAC Motors Stock Halved; Anthropic Fable 5 May Resume Access Soon
items.summary_zh: 今日热点导览 《给阿嬷的情书》总票房已突破19亿元 梁文锋署名，DeepSeek发布最新论文 WPS回应C盘占用问题，即将更新七月版本上线磁盘存储管理功能 触屏MacBook将搭载M5芯片发布，苹果计划跳过M6 Pro及M6 Max 美国监管部门关闭针对特斯拉Model 3及Model Y转向失控调查 TOP 3大新闻 韩国将于6月29日宣布三星、SK集团的多个大型项目 韩国将于6月29日宣布“三大工程”计划，韩国总统李在明将与政府各部门、三星电子和SK的官员会面，并发布政策和投资公告。李在明将于下午2点在总统府青瓦台发表讲话，届时韩国产业通商部、科学技术信息通信部、气候能源环境部和国土交通部将公布三大工程的政策。三星电子和SK将发布企业投资计划，据报道，两家企业未来十年的总投资规模最高或达2000万亿韩元（折合1.3万亿美元）。将重点布局半导体、AI算力数据中心与物理AI领域。（华尔街见闻、财联社） “超级牛散”章建平新动向，大举减仓江淮汽车 短短4个多月，江淮汽车股价腰斩，知名游资章建平也扛不住了。今年2月12日，葛卫东和章建平的妻子方文艳参与江淮汽车定增，均获配10亿元，定增价49.88元，当天收盘价57.96元。过去几个月来，江淮汽车股价遭遇重挫，6月26日跌至26.87元。由于葛卫东和方文艳参与定增的股份尚处于锁定期，这些参与定增股份已经浮亏近半。 据报道，超级牛散，有着…
items.summary_en: South Korea to announce massive investment plans from Samsung and SK Group, totaling up to 2,000 trillion won over 10 years, focusing on semiconductors, AI data centers, and physical AI. JAC Motors' stock price halved from its February placement price, prompting major investor Zhang Jianping to reduce holdings. Anthropic's Fable 5 model is expected to resume access soon.
items.why_zh: 三星和SK的巨额投资计划凸显韩国在半导体和AI领域的雄心，而江淮汽车股价暴跌反映了市场对汽车行业的担忧。
items.why_en: The massive investment plans by Samsung and SK highlight South Korea's ambition in semiconductors and AI, while JAC Motors' stock plunge reflects market concerns in the auto industry.

items.title_zh: 智谱何以站上万亿
items.title_en: Zhipu AI Reaches Trillion Valuation
items.summary_zh: 智谱何以站上万亿 21财经
items.summary_en: Chinese AI startup Zhipu AI has reportedly reached a trillion-yuan valuation, highlighting the rapid growth of China's AI industry and strong investor confidence in domestic large language models.
items.why_zh: 智谱估值破万亿，标志着中国AI大模型企业进入新量级，对行业格局具有重要影响。
items.why_en: Zhipu AI's trillion-yuan valuation marks a new milestone for Chinese AI companies, significantly impacting the industry landscape.

items.title_zh: 消息称百度旗下昆仑芯瞄准 500 亿美元估值，计划赴港 IPO
items.title_en: Baidu's Kunlunxin Plans Hong Kong IPO at $50B Valuation
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 29 日消息，据《The Information》昨日援引知情人士消息，百度旗下 AI 芯片子公司昆仑芯（Kunlunxin）计划在香港上市，目标估值约为 500 亿美元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 3405.58 亿元人民币）。 据报道，为了参与昆仑芯的首次公开募股（IPO），部分投资者被要求认购价值相当于其计划申购金额 3-7 倍的芯片产品。目前， 该消息尚无法核实 ，百度方面也没有立刻回应置评请求。 此前曾有传闻称，字节跳动正考虑采用昆仑芯的 AI 芯片。另据其中一位消息人士透露，腾讯目前已经成为昆仑芯的客户。 据IT之家此前报道 ，百度集团曾宣布， 昆仑芯已于今年 1 月 1 日通过其联席保荐人向香港证券交易所提交了上市申请表 。在拟议的分拆完成后，昆仑芯预计仍将作为子公司。 作为参考，昆仑芯最初成立于 2012 年，最初是百度内部负责研发 AI 芯片的业务部门，后来独立运营，不过百度目前仍保持着控股股东的地位。
items.summary_en: Baidu's AI chip subsidiary Kunlunxin plans a Hong Kong IPO with a target valuation of $50 billion. Investors may need to purchase chip products worth 3-7 times their subscription amount. Tencent is already a customer, and ByteDance is reportedly considering using its chips.
items.why_zh: 昆仑芯若成功上市，将成为中国AI芯片领域的重要里程碑，影响百度及整个AI芯片产业格局。
items.why_en: Kunlunxin's IPO would be a major milestone for China's AI chip industry, impacting Baidu and the broader sector.

items.title_zh: 豆包收费终于来了，大模型要全面进入收费时代了吗？
items.title_en: Doubao Starts Charging: Is the Era of Paid Large Models Coming?
items.summary_zh: 豆包收费终于来了，大模型要全面进入收费时代了吗？ thepaper.cn
items.summary_en: ByteDance's large model product Doubao has started charging users, signaling a shift from free to paid models in China. This move may prompt other AI companies to adopt similar monetization strategies.
items.why_zh: 豆包收费标志着国内大模型商业化加速，可能引发行业收费潮，影响用户和开发者生态。
items.why_en: Doubao's charging model accelerates commercialization of large models in China, potentially reshaping the user and developer ecosystem.

items.title_zh: 中国智谱AI声称GLM-5.2在网络安全领域可媲美Mythos
items.title_en: China’s Z.ai claims it can match Mythos on cybersecurity
items.summary_zh: 中国智谱AI（Z.ai）发布了开源权重模型GLM-5.2，一些研究人员声称该模型在特定漏洞查找和网络安全场景中可与Anthropic的Mythos模型相媲美。尽管在更通用的任务上GLM仍落后于Anthropic和OpenAI的模型，但中国在缩小与美国模型能力差距方面取得了显著进展。这一进展尤其令美国政府担忧，后者一直试图限制中国获取像Mythos和Fable这样的强大模型以及训练和运行这些模型所需的硬件。
items.summary_en: China's Zhipu AI ( Z.ai ) released its open-weight GLM-5.2, and some researchers have claimed that it matches Mythos in certain bug-finding and cybersecurity scenarios. While GLM lags behind models from Anthropic and OpenAI in other, more general tasks, it seems that China has dramatically reduced the gap in the capabilities between its models and those of the US. This level of advancement is particularly concerning to the US government, which has worked to restrict China's access to powerful models like Anthropic's Mythos and Fable, as well as the hardware necessary to train and run them. The…
items.why_zh: 这表明中国在AI安全领域快速追赶，可能削弱美国的技术出口管制效果。
items.why_en: It shows China's rapid catch-up in AI security, potentially undermining US export controls.

items.title_zh: Suno推出Spark孵化器计划，吸引独立艺术家加入其AI音乐平台
items.title_en: Suno launches Spark incubator program to feed independent artists to its AI machine
items.summary_zh: Suno希望超越单纯的AI音乐生成工具，成为流媒体平台和新星发掘者。其新推出的Spark孵化器计划为独立艺术家提供资助、指导和营销支持。申请者需为未签约的歌手、词曲作者或制作人，并同意将歌曲在Suno上开放供混音。部分条款在Suno社区引发争议，但整体上该计划旨在利用AI技术帮助独立音乐人获得更多曝光和机会。
items.summary_en: Suno has ambitions to be more than just a toy to churn out AI slop, it also wants to be a streaming destination and to break new artists. Spark is their new incubator program for independent artists that provides grants, mentorship, and marketing support. To apply, artists need to be an unsigned singer, songwriter, or producer releasing music under their own name. They also need to agree to some terms and conditions that have raised some eyebrows over on the Suno subreddit . For one, you need to agree to make your songs available on Suno for remixing. That's not necessarily super concerning, b…
items.why_zh: 这标志着AI音乐平台从单纯生成内容向培养原创艺术家转型，可能重塑音乐产业生态。
items.why_en: It marks AI music platforms shifting from content generation to nurturing original artists, potentially reshaping the music industry.

items.title_zh: 百度AI芯片部门昆仑芯计划赴港IPO，估值500亿美元
items.title_en: Baidu's AI chip unit Kunlunxin targets $50 billion Hong Kong IPO, The Information reports
items.summary_zh: 据The Information报道，百度旗下AI芯片部门昆仑芯（Kunlunxin）正计划在香港进行首次公开募股（IPO），目标估值高达500亿美元。昆仑芯专注于AI芯片设计，其产品广泛应用于云端和边缘计算场景。此次IPO若成功，将成为香港市场近年来规模最大的科技公司上市之一，进一步巩固百度在AI硬件领域的布局。目前百度官方尚未对此消息置评。
items.summary_en: Baidu's AI chip unit Kunlunxin targets $50 billion Hong Kong IPO, The Information reports Reuters
items.why_zh: 昆仑芯的高估值IPO凸显了AI芯片市场的巨大潜力，以及百度在AI基础设施领域的战略雄心。
items.why_en: Kunlunxin's massive IPO target underscores the booming AI chip market and Baidu's strategic push in AI infrastructure.

items.title_zh: 智谱万亿了，DeepSeek还会远吗？
items.title_en: Zhipu AI reaches trillion valuation, DeepSeek not far behind
items.summary_zh: 智谱万亿了，DeepSeek还会远吗？ 36Kr
items.summary_en: Chinese AI startup Zhipu AI has surpassed a trillion yuan valuation, with DeepSeek also showing rapid growth. This highlights the booming AI sector in China and investor confidence in local large model companies.
items.why_zh: 智谱AI的万亿估值标志着中国AI大模型领域的资本热潮，DeepSeek的崛起则预示着竞争格局的加速演变。
items.why_en: Zhipu AI's trillion valuation signals a capital frenzy in China's large model space, while DeepSeek's rise hints at intensifying competition.

items.title_zh: deepseek的技术突破会改变AI行业格局吗？
items.title_en: Can DeepSeek's Tech Breakthrough Reshape AI Industry?
items.summary_zh: deepseek的技术突破会改变AI行业格局吗？ 新浪网
items.summary_en: This article discusses whether DeepSeek's technological breakthrough could reshape the AI industry. As a leading open-source large model series in China, DeepSeek has recently made significant progress, attracting industry attention. The analysis covers its technical features, potential impacts, and challenges, suggesting that while DeepSeek's breakthrough may shift competitive dynamics, the full impact remains to be seen.
items.why_zh: DeepSeek作为国内开源大模型代表，其技术突破可能影响AI行业竞争格局。
items.why_en: As a representative open-source large model in China, DeepSeek's breakthrough could influence the competitive landscape of the AI industry.

items.title_zh: Fireply AI推出新平台，帮助品牌应对2026年社交媒体自然触达下降
items.title_en: Fireply AI Launches a New Platform to Help Brands Navigate Declining Organic Social Reach in 2026
items.summary_zh: Fireply AI推出新平台，旨在帮助品牌应对2026年社交媒体自然触达持续下降的挑战。该平台利用AI技术优化内容策略，提升品牌在社交媒体上的可见度和互动率。随着算法变化和竞争加剧，品牌自然触达越来越困难，Fireply AI的解决方案有望提供有效支持。
items.summary_en: Fireply AI Launches a New Platform to Help Brands Navigate Declining Organic Social Reach in 2026 TMX Newsfile
items.why_zh: 社交媒体自然触达下降是品牌营销的重大挑战，Fireply AI的解决方案具有实际应用价值。
items.why_en: Declining organic social reach is a major challenge for brand marketing, making Fireply AI's solution practically valuable.

items.title_zh: 古尔曼预计苹果今年发布搭载 M5 Ultra 芯片的 Mac Studio，M7 Ultra 机型 2028 年推出
items.title_en: Gurman: Apple to Launch M5 Ultra Mac Studio This Year, M7 Ultra in 2028
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 28 日消息，彭博社马克 · 古尔曼（Mark Gurman）今日爆料称，在苹果的产品规划中，目前有两项有关 Mac Studio 的更新计划： 一款预计于今年发布，搭载 M5 Ultra 芯片 一款目标在 2028 年发布，搭载 M7 Ultra 芯片 古尔曼此前爆料称， 苹果公司计划调整 M6 和 M7 系列芯片规划 ，仅有 M6 标准版，跳过 M6 Pro 和 M6 Max 等芯片，转而把研发重心放在更注重 AI 计算的 M7 系列芯片。 据IT之家此前报道， 苹果最新款 Mac Studio 机型发布于 2025 年 3 月 ，搭载 M4 Max 和 M3 Ultra 芯片，配备雷雳 5 端口，最高可选 512GB 统一内存（ 目前最高可选 96GB ），以及最高 16TB 固态硬盘。 古尔曼表示，苹果一直在对这款高性能台式机进行内部结构调整，包括 配备更出色的散热器 以提升散热性能，因为该机器需要承担要求更高的端侧 AI 工作负载。 古尔曼称这款机型 不会有重大的外观设计更新 ，至少在 M5 Ultra 机型上不会出现。因为苹果在大幅革新台式机设计方面向来不怎么着急：上一代 Mac Pro 的设计在停产前沿用了六年之久，而 Mac mini 最近的两次重大改款之间更是相隔了 15 年。
items.summary_en: Bloomberg's Mark Gurman reports that Apple plans to release a Mac Studio with M5 Ultra chip this year and an M7 Ultra version in 2028. Apple is shifting focus to AI-centric M7 chips, skipping M6 Pro and M6 Max. The new Mac Studio will feature improved cooling for on-device AI workloads but no major design changes.
items.why_zh: 苹果Mac Studio的芯片升级和AI计算重心调整，反映了端侧AI在苹果产品战略中的重要性。
items.why_en: Apple's Mac Studio chip upgrades and AI focus highlight the growing importance of on-device AI in Apple's product strategy.

items.title_zh: 美团CEO王兴回应股价低迷；京东在欧洲推出机器人维修服务 | 一周未来商业
items.title_en: Meituan CEO Wang Xing Responds to Stock Slump; JD Launches Robot Repair Service in Europe
items.summary_zh: 美团CEO王兴回应股价低迷；京东在欧洲推出机器人维修服务 | 一周未来商业 每日经济新闻
items.summary_en: Meituan CEO Wang Xing addressed the company's stock slump, while JD launched a robot repair service in Europe, highlighting Chinese tech firms' responses to market pressures and global expansion.
items.why_zh: 显示中国科技巨头在应对股价波动和加速国际化方面的战略调整。
items.why_en: Highlights strategic moves by Chinese tech giants in addressing stock volatility and accelerating international expansion.

items.title_zh: OpenAI发布GPT-5.6 Sol、Terra和Luna
items.title_en: OpenAI unveils GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra and Luna
items.summary_zh: OpenAI正式推出GPT-5.6系列模型，包括Sol、Terra和Luna三个版本。这些模型在推理、多模态能力和效率方面均有显著提升，进一步巩固了OpenAI在AI领域的领先地位。具体技术细节和性能数据尚未完全公开，但业界普遍期待其带来新的应用突破。
items.summary_en: OpenAI unveils GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra and Luna Let's Data Science
items.why_zh: GPT-5.6系列是OpenAI最新旗舰模型，其性能提升将推动AI应用发展。
items.why_en: The GPT-5.6 series is OpenAI's latest flagship, with performance gains that will drive AI application advancements.

items.title_zh: 通信行业研究：OpenAI联合博通推出自研推理芯片，豆包发布2.1 Pro模型
items.title_en: OpenAI Partners with Broadcom for Custom Inference Chip, Doubao Releases 2.1 Pro Model
items.summary_zh: 通信行业研究：OpenAI联合博通推出自研推理芯片，豆包发布2.1 Pro模型 证券之星
items.summary_en: OpenAI partners with Broadcom to launch a custom inference chip, aiming to improve AI inference efficiency and reduce costs. Meanwhile, ByteDance's Doubao releases the 2.1 Pro model, reflecting intense competition in AI chips and models.
items.why_zh: OpenAI自研推理芯片和豆包新模型发布，标志着AI产业链上下游的深度整合。
items.why_en: OpenAI's custom inference chip and Doubao's new model release signify deep integration across the AI industry chain.

items.title_zh: DeepSeek500亿融资背后，新质生产力估值逻辑确立 #DeepSeek #AI
items.title_en: Behind DeepSeek's 50 Billion Yuan Financing: New Quality Productivity Valuation Logic Established
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek500亿融资背后，新质生产力估值逻辑确立 #DeepSeek #AI 新浪财经
items.summary_en: DeepSeek's 50 billion yuan financing round has drawn attention to its valuation logic, which is seen as reflecting the market's recognition of 'new quality productivity'—frontier technologies like AI as drivers of high-quality economic growth. The high valuation signals long-term investor confidence in tech innovation and industrial transformation.
items.why_zh: DeepSeek的巨额融资标志着AI企业估值逻辑从传统模式转向以技术创新和生产力提升为核心的新范式。
items.why_en: DeepSeek's massive financing marks a shift in AI company valuation from traditional models to a new paradigm centered on technological innovation and productivity enhancement.

items.title_zh: 6月重磅技术突破！DeepSeek联合北大推出DSpark框架，你的手机电脑终于不卡了
items.title_en: DeepSeek and Peking University Launch DSpark Framework to Reduce Device Lag
items.summary_zh: 6月重磅技术突破！DeepSeek联合北大推出DSpark框架，你的手机电脑终于不卡了 搜狐网
items.summary_en: DeepSeek and Peking University launch the DSpark framework to reduce lag on devices running AI applications. By optimizing resource allocation and inference efficiency, it enhances on-device AI performance, promoting edge AI adoption.
items.why_zh: DSpark框架解决了端侧AI部署的关键瓶颈，对AI应用普及具有重要意义。
items.why_en: The DSpark framework addresses a key bottleneck in on-device AI deployment, crucial for widespread AI adoption.

items.title_zh: DeepSeek首轮融资超500亿 创始人仍握控制权
items.title_en: DeepSeek Raises Over 50 Billion in First Round, Founder Retains Control
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek首轮融资超500亿 创始人仍握控制权 新浪网
items.summary_en: DeepSeek completes its first funding round of over 50 billion RMB, a record for domestic AI. The founder retains control. The funds will be used for team expansion and technology development.
items.why_zh: DeepSeek巨额融资且创始人保持控制权，凸显其在AI领域的战略价值和创始人的主导地位。
items.why_en: DeepSeek's massive funding round with founder control underscores its strategic value in AI and the founder's leading role.

items.title_zh: Breakingviews观点：初级银行家将在AI浪潮中幸存
items.title_en: Breakingviews - Junior bankers will survive the AI onslaught
items.summary_zh: 路透社Breakingviews专栏指出，尽管人工智能（AI）可能取代许多金融行业的工作，但初级银行家将能够幸存下来。文章认为，AI虽然擅长处理数据和执行重复性任务，但初级银行家所从事的分析、客户关系和复杂决策等工作仍需要人类判断。此外，AI工具反而可能成为初级银行家的助手，帮助他们更高效地完成工作，从而专注于更高价值的任务。因此，初级银行家不必过度担忧AI的威胁。
items.summary_en: Breakingviews - Junior bankers will survive the AI onslaught Reuters
items.why_zh: 该观点挑战了AI将大规模取代金融业初级职位的普遍担忧，强调了人类判断的不可替代性。
items.why_en: This perspective challenges the common fear that AI will massively replace junior finance roles, highlighting the irreplaceable value of human judgment.

items.title_zh: 以色列研究发现AI模型再现关于犹太人的隐藏刻板印象
items.title_en: Israeli study finds AI models reproduce hidden stereotypes about Jews
items.summary_zh: 一项以色列研究发现，当前主流AI模型在生成内容时，会无意识地再现关于犹太人的隐藏刻板印象。研究团队通过测试多个AI模型，发现其在涉及犹太人身份、职业、性格等描述时，倾向于输出带有偏见的回应。该研究揭示了AI模型在训练数据中吸收并放大社会偏见的问题，呼吁加强AI伦理审查与数据多样性。
items.summary_en: Israeli study finds AI models reproduce hidden stereotypes about Jews Ynetnews
items.why_zh: 该研究再次警示AI模型可能放大社会偏见，对特定群体造成伤害，凸显了AI伦理与公平性的紧迫性。
items.why_en: The study warns that AI models can amplify social biases, potentially harming specific groups, underscoring the urgency of AI ethics and fairness.

items.title_zh: 菲律宾在AI监管方面立场如何？
items.title_en: Where does the Philippines stand on AI regulation?
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨了菲律宾在人工智能监管方面的现状与立场。目前菲律宾尚未出台全面的AI法律，但政府正通过国家AI路线图等政策框架推动AI发展，同时关注数据隐私、伦理和就业影响。文章分析了菲律宾在平衡创新与监管方面的挑战，以及与其他国家合作制定国际AI治理标准的可能性。
items.summary_en: Where does the Philippines stand on AI regulation? Inquirer Technology
items.why_zh: 了解菲律宾的AI监管立场有助于把握东南亚AI治理趋势，对跨国AI企业在该地区的合规与战略布局具有参考价值。
items.why_en: Understanding the Philippines' AI regulatory stance helps grasp Southeast Asian AI governance trends, offering insights for multinational AI companies' compliance and strategy in the region.

items.title_zh: 劳埃德银行集团将创造超1000个AI岗位并部署新型欺诈检测代理
items.title_en: Lloyds Banking Group (LSE: LLOY) To Create Over 1,000 AI Jobs And Deploy New Fraud Detection Agents
items.summary_zh: 劳埃德银行集团（Lloyds Banking Group）宣布计划创造超过1000个AI相关工作岗位，并部署新型欺诈检测代理。此举旨在利用人工智能技术提升银行运营效率和安全性。新岗位将涵盖AI开发、数据科学等领域，而欺诈检测代理将基于机器学习模型实时识别可疑交易。这一战略反映了传统金融机构加速数字化转型的趋势，预计将增强劳埃德在金融科技领域的竞争力。
items.summary_en: Lloyds Banking Group (LSE: LLOY) To Create Over 1,000 AI Jobs And Deploy New Fraud Detection Agents foreignpolicyjournal.com
items.why_zh: 这表明大型银行正大规模投资AI以提升反欺诈能力，对金融行业AI应用具有示范意义。
items.why_en: This signals major banks' large-scale AI investment for fraud prevention, setting a precedent for AI adoption in finance.

items.title_zh: 苹果 2027 年产品线曝光，消息称 iPhone 19 Pro 系列、Ultra 2 阔折叠已开模测试
items.title_en: Apple's 2027 Product Line Leaked: iPhone 19 Pro Series and Ultra 2 Foldable in Mold Testing
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 29 日消息，博主 @数码闲聊站 今日发文曝光了苹果 2027 年产品线： iPhone Air 2 6.55"1.5K 120Hz LTPO OLED✓ iPhone 18 6.3"1.5K 120Hz LTPO OLED✓ iPhone 18e 6.12"1.5K 60Hz LTPS OLED✓ iPhone 19 Pro 系列已开模测试✓ iPhone Ultra 2 阔折叠已开模测试✓ 据IT之家此前报道， 天风国际证券分析师郭明錤表示 2027 年上半年低端 iPhone 机型 （预估指 iPhone 18 和 iPhone 18e）均采用 9GB DRAM 内存，相比较当前 iPhone 17 标准版（8GB，4 颗 2GB 芯片）高 12.5%。 另外，消息源 yeux1122 透露， 苹果 iPhone Air 2 将采用标准版 A20 芯片 ，而非 iPhone 18 Pro 系列 / iPhone Fold 的 A20 Pro 芯片，这与初代 iPhone Air 呈现鲜明区别。如果消息属实，这代表苹果 iPhone Air 的定位在苹果产品线中进行了降级。 关于苹果折叠屏，韩媒 The Elec 发布消息称，苹果首款折叠屏 iPhone 将于 7 月底启动量产。在近期因铰链问题一度传出延期消息的背景下， 苹果仍准备按原计划于 9 月发布新机…
items.summary_en: Leaked details reveal Apple's 2027 lineup including iPhone 19 Pro and Ultra 2 foldable in mold testing. Analyst Ming-Chi Kuo predicts 9GB RAM for low-end models, while the foldable iPhone is reportedly on track for September launch despite hinge issues.
items.why_zh: 这揭示了苹果未来三年的产品规划，尤其是折叠屏和芯片策略的调整，对消费电子行业具有重要参考价值。
items.why_en: This reveals Apple's three-year product roadmap, especially foldable and chip strategy shifts, offering key insights for the consumer electronics industry.

items.title_zh: 德国AI部署可提供3000亿欧元解决方案应对劳动力短缺
items.title_en: German AI Rollout Offers €300 Billion Fix for Worker Shortage
items.summary_zh: 据彭博社报道，德国大规模部署人工智能技术有望提供价值3000亿欧元的解决方案，以应对日益严重的劳动力短缺问题。德国正面临人口老龄化导致的劳动力萎缩，AI自动化被视为填补关键岗位空缺的关键手段。该计划涵盖制造业、医疗和物流等多个领域，预计将显著提升生产力。然而，实施过程中也面临数据隐私、技术伦理和就业转型等挑战。
items.summary_en: German AI Rollout Offers €300 Billion Fix for Worker Shortage Bloomberg.com
items.why_zh: 这展示了AI在解决宏观社会经济问题（如劳动力短缺）中的巨大潜力，为其他国家提供了参考。
items.why_en: This demonstrates AI's potential to address macro socio-economic issues like labor shortages, offering a model for other nations.

items.title_zh: AI版权诉讼正成为商业风险——每个使用AI的公司都需要了解
items.title_en: AI Copyright Lawsuits Are Becoming a Business Risk—What Every Company Using AI Needs to Know
items.summary_zh: 随着AI生成内容的普及，版权诉讼正成为企业面临的重大商业风险。文章指出，使用AI的公司可能因训练数据或输出内容侵犯版权而面临法律挑战。关键风险包括未经授权使用受版权保护的材料训练模型、AI生成内容与现有作品相似等。企业需采取合规措施，如审查训练数据来源、建立内容审核机制，并关注相关法律动态。
items.summary_en: AI Copyright Lawsuits Are Becoming a Business Risk—What Every Company Using AI Needs to Know Times Square Chronicles
items.why_zh: 这提醒企业必须重视AI版权合规，否则可能面临巨额赔偿和声誉损失，是AI商业化中的关键法律议题。
items.why_en: This highlights the critical need for AI copyright compliance to avoid lawsuits and reputational damage, a key legal issue in AI commercialization.

items.title_zh: Odyssey：构建可验证的局部保真基础模型框架
items.title_en: Odyssey: Constructing Verifiable Local Truth-Preserving Foundation Models
items.summary_zh: arXiv论文提出名为ODYSSEY的范畴论框架，用于构建可验证的、局部保真的基础模型。该框架通过组合“foundries”（构建块架构组件）实现，这些组件指定了局部上下文、局部表示族、限制映射、粘合规则、障碍策略、更新义务和人类可视图层。每个foundry是一个组织化的知识层，包含论证组件。具体foundry由通用foundry（如证据/论证、操作决策等）构建而成。该工作旨在提高AI系统的可解释性和可靠性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27593v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We introduce a categorical framework called ODYSSEY for constructing verifiable, local truth-preserving foundation models as compositions of foundries: building-block architectural components that specify a cover of local contexts, local representation families, restriction maps, gluing rules, obstruction policies, update obligations, and human-facing views. A foundry is an organized sheaf of knowledge that carries within it an argumentation component. Concrete foundries are built from generic foundries such as evidence/argument, operational deci…
items.why_zh: 该研究为构建可信AI提供了理论基础，通过形式化方法确保模型局部保真，对AI安全领域有重要价值。
items.why_en: This research provides a theoretical foundation for trustworthy AI by formalizing local truth preservation, crucial for AI safety.

items.title_zh: DysLexLens：用于分析在线论坛中阅读障碍学习者见解的低资源LLM框架
items.title_en: DysLexLens: A Low-Resource LLM Framework for Analysing Dyslexic Learners Insights from Online Forums
items.summary_zh: arXiv论文提出DysLexLens，一个低资源大语言模型框架，用于通过在线论坛讨论分析阅读障碍学习者使用AI工具的经验。该框架设计为端到端、可追溯证据的架构，将嘈杂的社交媒体帖子转换为词典驱动的语料库，并提供基于知识图谱的分析。研究旨在弥补对阅读障碍学习者AI使用体验研究的不足，为开发更包容的AI工具提供依据。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27619v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Dyslexic learners increasingly use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support reading, writing, organisation, and study-related tasks. However, their lived experiences with these tools remain largely underexamined. This paper proposes DysLexLens, a low-resource LLM framework, designed to analyse dyslexic learners experience with AI through online forum discussions. DysLexLens is designed as an end-to-end, evidence-traceable architecture which transforms noisy social media posts into a dictionary-driven corpora, provides knowledge-graph (KG)-ba…
items.why_zh: 该研究关注特殊教育需求群体与AI的交互，有助于推动AI工具的包容性设计，具有重要社会意义。
items.why_en: This research focuses on AI interaction for special education needs, promoting inclusive AI design with significant social impact.

items.title_zh: ToE：一种分层可解释的声明验证框架，支持动态多源证据检索与聚合
items.title_en: ToE: A Hierarchical and Explainable Claim Verification Framework with Dynamic Multi-source Evidence Retrieval and Aggregation
items.summary_zh: arXiv论文提出Tree of Evidence (ToE)，一种分层证据推理框架用于自动事实核查。ToE将每个声明建模为动态扩展的论证树，并集成强化学习驱动的多源检索机制。该框架旨在应对AI生成错误信息（如生成引擎优化GEO投毒）的威胁，通过动态检索和聚合多源证据提高事实核查的准确性和可解释性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27736v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The rapid spread of fake news poses increasing threats to information ecosystems, especially as AI-generated misinformation under Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) poisoning allows adversarially crafted content to be systematically surfaced by retrieval systems, contaminating LLM reasoning. In this paper, we propose Tree of Evidence (ToE), a hierarchical evidence reasoning framework for automated fact-checking that models each claim as a dynamically expanding argument tree. ToE integrates a reinforcement learning-driven multi-source retrieval…
items.why_zh: 该研究针对AI生成错误信息的挑战，提出可解释的事实核查方法，对维护信息生态健康至关重要。
items.why_en: This research tackles AI-generated misinformation with explainable fact-checking, vital for information ecosystem health.

items.title_zh: 理解图世界模型中的展开误差
items.title_en: Understanding Rollout Error in Graph World Models
items.summary_zh: arXiv论文研究图世界模型（GWM）中的长时域展开误差。在许多规划环境中，状态表示为图（如智能体、工具、技能、路线和依赖关系），而非向量或图像。论文提出了统一的固定边和动态边GWM框架，包含动作节点用于节点、边等预测。研究发现局部预测误差可能保持局部或通过图传播，当边是预测而非固定时，失败模式会改变。该工作有助于理解基于图的规划模型的误差传播特性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27780v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: World models are often used for planning by rolling learned dynamics forward. Many planning environments, however, are not vectors or images; they are graphs of agents, tools, skills, routes, and dependencies. In these settings, a local prediction error may stay local or spread through the graph, and the failure mode changes again when edges are predicted rather than fixed. This paper studies long-horizon rollout error in Graph World Models (GWMs). We formulate a unified fixed-edge and dynamic-edge GWM framework with action nodes for node-, edge-…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了图世界模型中误差传播的机制，对提升基于图的AI规划系统的可靠性具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This work uncovers error propagation mechanisms in graph world models, key to improving reliability of graph-based AI planning systems.

items.title_zh: 基于参数化世界模型的迭代语言规划减少LLM幻觉传播
items.title_en: Grounded Iterative Language Planning: How Parameterized World Models Reduce Hallucination Propagation in LLM Agents
items.summary_zh: 该研究对比了两种用于语言智能体的世界模型：基于智能体的世界模型调用LLM API进行灵活推理，但其错误表现为难以用回归损失评估的幻觉状态变化；参数化世界模型作为训练好的转移预测器，其错误更易通过NodeMSE等指标衡量，但作为独立规划器较弱。研究在四个图结构规划基准上比较了这两类模型，并引入了新的方法以减少幻觉传播。结果表明，参数化世界模型能有效降低幻觉传播，提升规划可靠性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27806v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: World models for language agents come in two useful forms. An agent-based world model calls an LLM API and reasons flexibly in language, but its errors appear as hallucinated state changes that are hard to score with ordinary regression losses. A parameterized world model is a trained transition predictor; its errors are easier to measure with quantities such as NodeMSE, delta accuracy, and validity accuracy, but it is usually weaker as a standalone planner. We compare these two families on four graph-structured planning benchmarks and introduce…
items.why_zh: 该研究为减少LLM智能体中的幻觉传播提供了新思路，对提升AI规划系统的可靠性具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This work offers a new approach to reducing hallucination propagation in LLM agents, crucial for improving the reliability of AI planning systems.

items.title_zh: NormAct：具身规划中隐藏社会规范遵循的基准测试
items.title_en: NormAct: A Benchmark for Hidden Social Norm Compliance in Embodied Planning
items.summary_zh: 多模态大语言模型越来越多地被部署为具身规划器，任务成功不仅需要完成明确目标，还需符合社会规范。现有评估通常关注显式目标达成或直接规范知识，很少评估规划器能否推断并应用隐藏约束。本文引入NormAct基准，用于评估具身规划中隐藏社会规范的遵循情况。该基准包含多种场景，要求模型在行动序列中隐式遵守社会规范，为评估MLLM的社会智能提供了新工具。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27826v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are increasingly deployed as embodied planners in egocentric environments, where task success requires not only achieving instructed goals but also acting in socially appropriate ways. While explicit goals may render certain actions optimal, implicit social norms often impose hidden constraints. Existing evaluations typically focus on explicit goal achievement or direct norm knowledge, seldom assessing whether planners can infer and apply these hidden constraints within action sequences. We introduce NormA…
items.why_zh: 该基准填补了评估AI具身规划中社会规范遵循的空白，对开发更安全、更符合社会期望的自主系统至关重要。
items.why_en: This benchmark fills a gap in evaluating social norm compliance in embodied AI, essential for developing safer and more socially acceptable autonomous systems.

items.title_zh: 京东氧气AI商品中心：面向商品理解与管理的工业级大模型解决方案
items.title_en: JD Oxygen AI Item Center (Oxygen AIIC) V1: An Industrial-Scale LLM/VLM-Centric Solution for Item Understanding, Management, and Applications
items.summary_zh: 京东作为服务超7亿活跃用户和数百万商家的电商平台，拥有数百亿SKU。高质量的结构化商品知识对提升消费体验、降低管理成本至关重要，但面临快速涌现的新概念、海量SKU的知识生产以及多样化下游需求三大挑战。为此，京东推出了氧气AI商品中心（Oxygen AIIC），一个以LLM/VLM为核心的工业级解决方案，用于商品理解、管理和应用。该系统通过大模型技术自动生成和维护商品知识，显著提升了效率和准确性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.28070v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: JD.com, one of the world's largest e-commerce platforms, serves over 700 million active users and millions of merchants, with a catalog of tens of billions of SKUs. At this scale, high-quality, structured item knowledge underpins a better consumer experience, lower management costs, and higher operational efficiency-yet producing and serving it poses three industrial-scale challenges: fast-emerging concepts, high-quality knowledge production for massive SKUs, and diverse downstream requirements. To address these challenges, we present the JD Oxyg…
items.why_zh: 该方案展示了大型电商平台如何利用大模型技术解决海量商品知识管理的实际工业挑战，具有重要应用价值。
items.why_en: This solution demonstrates how large e-commerce platforms leverage LLMs to tackle real-world challenges in managing massive item knowledge, with significant practical value.

items.title_zh: 观点：“机器遗忘”一词在LLM研究中被过度使用
items.title_en: Position: The Term "Machine Unlearning" Is Overused in LLMs
items.summary_zh: 大型语言模型面临越来越多的“遗忘”要求，包括删除训练数据、知识或行为，原因涉及监管删除义务、版权/许可争议以及安全或产品政策要求。本文认为，“机器遗忘”在LLM研究中被过度使用，应保留用于数据集定义的删除：精确移除指定遗忘集的训练影响，使模型与从头训练近似不可区分。许多当前被称为“遗忘”的任务实际上属于其他范畴，如知识编辑或模型修正。文章呼吁更精确的术语使用，以推动研究聚焦于真正的遗忘问题。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27379v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large language models increasingly face demands to "forget" training data, knowledge, or behaviors due to regulatory deletion obligations, copyright/licensing disputes, and safety or product-policy requirements. This position paper argues that machine unlearning is overused as a term in LLM research and should be reserved for dataset-defined deletion: removing the training influence of a precisely specified forget set such that the resulting model is approximately indistinguishable from retraining without that data. We contend that many tasks c…
items.why_zh: 该观点有助于澄清LLM遗忘研究的核心问题，避免术语滥用导致的研究方向分散。
items.why_en: This clarification helps focus LLM unlearning research on the core problem of dataset-defined deletion, preventing dilution of efforts.

items.title_zh: OverFlowLight：城市交叉口实时防堵与交通信号优化
items.title_en: OverFlowLight: Real-Time Gridlock Prevention and Traffic Signal Optimization for Urban Intersections
items.summary_zh: 队列溢出是城市交通拥堵的严重后果，当车辆排队超过交叉口容量时，会阻塞上游交通并引发级联拥堵。现有交通信号控制算法主要优化通行效率，但在高峰时段常无法解决溢出问题，加剧拥堵和安全隐患。本文提出OverFlowLight，一个实时框架，旨在主动解决溢出并提升整体信号控制性能。该框架首先引入精确检测队列溢出的机制，然后动态调整信号配时以预防溢出，实验表明能有效减少拥堵和提升通行效率。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27381v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Queue overflow, a severe consequence of urban traffic congestion, occurs when vehicle queues exceed intersection capacity, obstructing upstream traffic and triggering cascading gridlocks. Prevailing traffic signal control (TSC) algorithms, primarily optimized for throughput, often fail to address overflow during peak hours, exacerbating congestion and creating safety hazards. We propose OverFlowLight, a real-time framework designed to preemptively resolve overflow and enhance overall TSC performance. It first introduces a mechanism to accuratel…
items.why_zh: 该研究针对城市交通拥堵的关键问题——队列溢出，提出了实时预防方案，对缓解城市交通拥堵具有实际意义。
items.why_en: This work addresses the critical issue of queue overflow in urban traffic, offering a real-time prevention solution with practical significance for congestion mitigation.

items.title_zh: CalBrief：基于证据校准的科学简报大模型诊断基准
items.title_en: CalBrief: A Pilot Diagnostic Benchmark for Evidence-Calibrated Scientific Briefing with Large Language Models
items.summary_zh: 大型语言模型越来越多地被用作研究助手，但尚不清楚它们能否根据证据的强度和范围校准研究结论。本文研究证据校准的科学简报：给定一组相关论文，系统应生成包含证据强度、范围边界和缺失证据说明的结论。作者贡献了一个包含16个异构科学证据包和96个人工验证结论的试点基准，并使用CalBrief评估了多个LLM的表现，发现当前模型在证据校准方面存在不足。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27383v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as research assistants, yet it remains unclear whether they can calibrate research takeaways to the strength and scope of the supporting evidence. We study evidence-calibrated scientific briefing: given a bounded package of related papers, a system should generate package-level takeaways with evidence strength, scope boundaries, and missing-evidence caveats. We contribute a verified pilot benchmark of 16 heterogeneous scientific evidence packages and 96 human-verified takeaways, and we use CalB…
items.why_zh: 该基准为评估LLM作为研究助手时的证据校准能力提供了重要工具，对确保AI生成科学结论的可靠性至关重要。
items.why_en: This benchmark provides a crucial tool for evaluating LLMs' ability to calibrate evidence in scientific briefing, essential for reliable AI-generated research conclusions.

items.title_zh: 智能体出版协议：科学出版现代化的尝试
items.title_en: Agentic Publication Protocol: An Attempt to Modernize Scientific Publication
items.summary_zh: 科学出版仍主要围绕静态手稿组织，但科学进步很大程度上依赖于隐性知识：如何运行代码、复现图表、解释边缘案例、选择有用的后续方向以及避免失败路径。大语言模型智能体创造了不仅发布知识，而且以未来读者和研究者可直接使用的形式发布操作知识的机会。本文概述了智能体出版协议（APP），一种轻量级仓库格式，用于打包论文及其相关的可执行智能体，使研究成果更具可复现性和可操作性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27386v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Scientific publication is still organized primarily around static manuscripts, even though much of scientific progress depends on tacit know-how: how to run code, reproduce figures, interpret edge cases, choose useful follow-up directions, and avoid failed paths. Large language model agents create an opportunity to publish not only knowledge, but also operational know-how in a form that future readers and researchers can directly use. This paper outlines the Agentic Publication Protocol (APP), a lightweight repository format for packaging a pap…
