items.why_zh: 该协议有望改变科学出版方式，使隐性知识得以传播，提升研究的可复现性和实用性。
items.why_en: This protocol could transform scientific publishing by enabling dissemination of tacit knowledge, improving reproducibility and practical utility of research.

items.title_zh: 面向编码LLM中隐式软件世界模型的评估
items.title_en: Towards Evaluation of Implicit Software World Models in Coding LLMs
items.summary_zh: 软件工程需要推理软件行为，无论是人类还是AI智能体。本文称支持这种推理的内部模型为软件世界模型，并认为当前代码执行基准只覆盖了其中一部分——控制流。本文通过将可观察轴转向执行资源（如峰值内存、墙钟时间、分析器输出排名），朝着更广泛的评估迈出一步。研究在方法和行粒度上预测这些指标，为评估编码LLM的软件世界模型提供了新维度。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27406v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Software engineering, whether performed by humans or by AI agents, requires reasoning about how software behaves. We call the internal model that supports such reasoning the software world model, and view current code-execution benchmarks as covering one well-studied slice of it -- control flow. In this paper, we take a step toward a broader evaluation by shifting the observable axis to execution resources: alongside test outcome and exception class, we predict peak memory, wall-clock time, and ranked profiler outputs at method and line granula…
items.why_zh: 该研究拓展了编码LLM评估的维度，有助于更全面地理解模型对软件行为的推理能力。
items.why_en: This work broadens the evaluation of coding LLMs, providing insights into their reasoning about software behavior beyond control flow.

items.title_zh: 推测性精炼：一种混合自回归扩散解码策略及其跨基准测试行为
items.title_en: Speculative Refinement: A Hybrid Autoregressive Diffusion Decoding Strategy and Its Behavior Across Benchmarks
items.summary_zh: arXiv:2606.27474v1 提出了一种名为推测性精炼（SpecRef）的训练无关混合方法，该方法通过熵引导的选择性掩码，从自回归（AR）草稿中热启动掩码扩散语言模型。研究在六个基准测试（HumanEval、MBPP、GSM8K、BBH、ARC-Challenge、HellaSwag）上，使用三种不同的评估协议（基于执行的pass@1、精确匹配、对数似然评分）对SpecRef进行评估，揭示了多项超越当前方法的发现。该工作为结合AR和扩散解码的生成系统提供了新的评估视角。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27474v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: How should we evaluate generation systems that combine autoregressive (AR) and diffusion decoding? We study this question through Speculative Refinement (SpecRef), a training-free hybrid method that warm-starts a masked diffusion language model from an AR draft using entropy-guided selective masking. Evaluating SpecRef across six benchmarks (HumanEval, MBPP, GSM8K, BBH, ARC-Challenge, HellaSwag) with three distinct evaluation protocols (execution-based pass@1, exact-match, log-likelihood scoring), we surface several findings relevant beyond our…
items.why_zh: 该研究为结合自回归与扩散解码的混合生成系统提供了系统性的评估框架和重要发现。
items.why_en: This work provides a systematic evaluation framework and key insights for hybrid generation systems combining autoregressive and diffusion decoding.

items.title_zh: DMV-Bench：通过偶然线索注入诊断长时程多模态智能体的视觉记忆
items.title_en: DMV-Bench: Diagnosing Long-Horizon Multimodal Agents' Visual Memory with Incidental Cue Injection
items.summary_zh: arXiv:2606.27499v1 介绍了 DMV-Bench，这是首个针对多模态智能体视觉记忆的交互式基准测试。该基准测试基于一个包含1000种产品变体的受控家居装饰电商目录，通过文本泄漏契约确保每个任务的判别信号不被文本信息泄露。DMV-Bench 旨在评估智能体在交互环境中真正需要记住视觉信息而非文本信息时的表现，填补了现有基准测试在视觉记忆评估方面的空白。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27499v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Research on agent memory has matured rapidly, but almost entirely on the text side: few existing benchmarks ask, in an interactive environment, when an agent genuinely needs to remember what it saw rather than what it could write down. We introduce DMV-Bench (Code: https://github.com/yyyujintang/DMV-Bench), the first interactive benchmark for multimodal-agent visual memory. DMV-Bench is built on a controlled home-furnishing e-commerce catalogue of 1,000 product variants in which a text-leakage contract keeps the discriminative signal of each ta…
items.why_zh: 该基准测试填补了多模态智能体视觉记忆评估的空白，对推动智能体在真实交互环境中的记忆能力研究具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This benchmark fills a gap in evaluating visual memory for multimodal agents, crucial for advancing agent memory research in interactive environments.

items.title_zh: 大型语言模型教授视觉学生：细粒度概念知识的跨模态迁移
items.title_en: Large Language Model Teaches Visual Students: Cross-Modality Transfer of Fine-Grained Conceptual Knowledge
items.summary_zh: arXiv:2606.27527v1 提出 LaViD（语言到视觉知识蒸馏）框架，用于将大型语言模型（LLM）的高层语义知识迁移到纯视觉学生模型。该框架不依赖配对多模态数据，而是通过提示LLM生成多项选择题来提取概念信号。LaViD 展示了LLM在跨模态监督中的潜力，为视觉模型获取细粒度概念知识提供了新途径。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27527v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) possess broad conceptual knowledge acquired through large-scale text pretraining, yet their potential to supervise models in other modalities remains underexplored. In this work, we propose LaViD--Language-to-Visual Knowledge Distillation--a simple and effective framework for transferring high-level semantic knowledge from a language-only teacher to a vision-only student model. Instead of relying on paired multimodal data, LaViD elicits conceptual signals from an LLM by prompting it to generate multiple-choice quest…
items.why_zh: 该工作探索了LLM作为跨模态教师的新范式，为视觉模型获取语言中的细粒度概念知识提供了有效方法。
items.why_en: This work explores a new paradigm of using LLMs as cross-modal teachers, providing an effective way for vision models to acquire fine-grained conceptual knowledge from language.

items.title_zh: hia-gat：面向高速公路帧级交通冲突风险预测的异构交互感知图注意力网络
items.title_en: hia-gat: A Heterogeneous Interaction-Aware Graph Attention Network For Frame-Level Traffic Conflict Risk Prediction On Freeways
items.summary_zh: arXiv:2606.27577v1 将帧级高速公路风险评估建模为多智能体场景图级别的二分类问题，每个视频或轨迹帧根据TTC或PET冲突是否超过严重性阈值被标记为有风险。论文构建了每帧的关系感知图，以车辆为节点，两种交互类型（同车道纵向和相邻车道横向）为边，并增强物理信息边缘特征以匹配追尾和变道冲突机制。该方法在结构化基准测试上进行了评估。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27577v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This paper formulates frame-level freeway risk assessment as a multi-agent scene graph-level binary classification problem, where each video or trajectory frame is labeled risky if any TTC- or PET-based conflict violates a specified severity threshold. We construct a relation-aware graph per frame with vehicles as nodes and two interaction types as edges: same-lane (longitudinal) and adjacent-lane (lateral), augmented with physics-informed edge features aligned to rear-end and lane-change conflict mechanisms. Building on a structured benchmarki…
items.why_zh: 该研究为高速公路帧级交通冲突风险预测提供了新的图神经网络方法，有助于提升交通安全分析的准确性。
items.why_en: This study provides a novel graph neural network approach for frame-level traffic conflict risk prediction on freeways, improving traffic safety analysis.

items.title_zh: 通过K阶马尔可夫近似对多元时间序列预测模型进行全局解释
items.title_en: Global Explanations for Multivariate Time Series Forecasting Models via $K$-Order Markov Approximations
items.summary_zh: arXiv:2606.27599v1 提出 KARMA 方法，用于解释时间序列预测模型。该方法通过构建马尔可夫代理模型来捕捉预测器学习到的时间依赖性，克服了现有XAI方法假设时间戳特征独立而忽略时序依赖的问题。KARMA 能够提供符合数据序列和因果结构的解释。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27599v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: While many explainable AI (XAI) methods have been proposed, most are not designed for time-series forecasting models and often rely on the implicit assumption that timestamp features are independent. This assumption ignores the fundamental property of temporal dependence and can lead to explanations that violate the sequential and causal structure of the data. We introduce \textsc{KARMA}, a method for explaining time-series predictors by constructing a Markov surrogate model that captures the temporal dependencies learned by the predictor. Our…
items.why_zh: 该工作解决了时间序列预测模型可解释性中时序依赖被忽略的关键问题，提供了更合理的解释方法。
items.why_en: This work addresses the critical issue of ignoring temporal dependencies in explainability for time-series forecasting, offering more faithful explanations.

items.title_zh: 利用单细胞RNA测序重建人类脂肪组织中脂肪细胞的发育轨迹
items.title_en: Reconstructing the Developmental Trajectory of Adipocytes in Human Adipose Tissue Using Single-Cell RNA Sequencing
items.summary_zh: arXiv:2606.27657v1 利用单细胞RNA测序技术重建了人类脂肪组织中脂肪细胞的发育轨迹。研究识别出15个转录上不同的细胞簇，包括7个过渡状态，揭示了脂肪细胞分化的动态过程。检测到16条功能活跃的信号通路介导脂肪细胞与其祖细胞之间的细胞通讯。该研究为理解肥胖及相关代谢疾病提供了新见解。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27657v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Obesity is a global health crisis associated with metabolic disorders such as type 2 diabetes and cardiovascular disease. This study employed single-cell RNA sequencing to reconstruct the developmental trajectory of human adipocytes from adipose tissue samples. Our analysis identified 15 transcriptionally distinct cell clusters, including 7 transitional states, revealing the dynamic process of adipocyte differentiation. We detected 16 functionally active signaling pathways mediating cellular communication between adipocytes and their progenitor…
items.why_zh: 该研究通过单细胞测序揭示了脂肪细胞发育的详细轨迹，对理解肥胖和代谢疾病机制具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This study reveals the detailed developmental trajectory of adipocytes via single-cell sequencing, important for understanding obesity and metabolic diseases.

items.title_zh: 从信号到迁移：大型语言模型中基于探针的不确定性估计的因子化研究
items.title_en: From Signals to Transfer: A Factorised Study of Probe-Based Uncertainty Estimation in Large Language Models
items.summary_zh: arXiv:2606.27679v1 对大型语言模型（LLM）中基于探针的不确定性估计（UE）进行了因子化研究。在匹配条件下，结果显示原始隐藏状态和注意力特征在域内难以被超越。然而，在跨域迁移时，基于特征的探针表现更好。该研究通过分离特征设计、训练数据构建和评估设置等因素，厘清了不同因素对UE性能的实际影响。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27679v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Probe-based uncertainty estimation (UE) has emerged as a prominent approach to detect hallucinations in Large Language Models (LLMs) by learning uncertainty from internal model signals. Yet, recent methods vary simultaneously across feature design, training data construction, and evaluation setting, obscuring what actually drives performance. To address this issue, we propose a factorised study of probe-based UE under matched conditions. Our results show that raw hidden states and attention features are difficult to outperform in-domain. Howeve…
items.why_zh: 该研究通过因子化分析揭示了LLM不确定性估计中不同因素的真实贡献，为改进幻觉检测方法提供了指导。
items.why_en: This factorised study reveals the true contributions of different factors in LLM uncertainty estimation, guiding improvements in hallucination detection.

items.title_zh: 多期波动率预测中的部署端自适应性
items.title_en: Deployment-Side Adaptiveness in Multi-Horizon Volatility Forecasting
items.summary_zh: arXiv:2606.27688v1 研究了金融预测中部署策略对性能的影响。在多期波动率预测中，训练好的多输出（MIMO）预测器通过改变推理时的滚动规则，可以产生一系列具有不同准确性和成本特征的预测。在20个股票波动率序列、三个预测期和多种架构上的实验表明，部署端的选择对预测性能有显著影响。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27688v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In financial forecasting, predictive performance depends not only on which model is trained, but also on how the trained model is deployed. We study this issue in multi-horizon volatility forecasting. Our starting point is that a trained multi-output (MIMO) forecaster does not define a single deployable predictor: by changing the inference-time rollout rule, the same trained model induces a family of forecasts with different accuracy and cost profiles. Across 20 stock-volatility series, three forecast horizons, and architectures ranging from li…
items.why_zh: 该研究强调了金融预测中部署策略的重要性，表明模型训练后如何部署同样关键。
items.why_en: This study highlights the importance of deployment strategies in financial forecasting, showing that how a model is deployed after training is equally critical.

items.title_zh: 类别频率引导的扩散模型噪声调度
items.title_en: Class-frequency Guided Noise Schedule for Diffusion Models
items.summary_zh: 本文首次研究了扩散模型中类别频率与多尺度噪声调度之间的相关性。在基于分数的生成模型中，低密度区域常导致分数估计不准确，从而影响生成质量。虽然多尺度噪声调度可以在扩散过程中缓解这一问题，但低频类别仍面临大面积低密度区域的挑战，导致其分数估计比高频类别更不准确。此外，论文还提出了其他改进措施。该研究为提升扩散模型在类别不平衡数据上的生成性能提供了新思路。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27696v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In this paper, we are the first to examine the correlations between class frequency and the multi-scale noise schedule within diffusion models. For score-based generative models, low-density regions often lead to inaccurately estimated scores, thereby compromising the generation quality. Although the multi-scale noise schedule can alleviate this issue during the diffusion process, low-frequency classes still face the challenge of large low-density regions, resulting in more inaccurate estimated scores than high-frequency classes. Furthermore, h…
items.why_zh: 首次揭示类别频率与扩散模型噪声调度的关系，有助于提升类别不平衡场景下的生成质量。
items.why_en: First to reveal the correlation between class frequency and noise schedule, improving generation quality under class imbalance.

items.title_zh: Flexformer：具有可学习注意力核的灵活线性Transformer
items.title_en: Flexformer: Flexible Linear Transformer with Learnable Attention Kernel
items.summary_zh: Transformer模型依赖注意力机制捕获长程依赖，但面临二次复杂度问题，限制了其在长序列上的可扩展性。基于核的线性注意力降低了复杂度，但通常使用固定或弱可学习的核，限制了表达能力和性能。本文提出Flexformer，一种灵活的线性Transformer，以完全数据驱动的方式学习注意力核。Flexformer基于随机傅里叶特征的线性注意力，并将谱频率作为可学习参数，从而在保持线性复杂度的同时提升模型表现。实验表明，Flexformer在多个长序列任务上优于现有线性Transformer方法。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27748v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Transformer models rely on attention mechanism to capture long-range dependencies but suffer from quadratic complexity, limiting their scalability to long sequences. Kernel-based linear attention reduces this complexity but typically relies on fixed or weakly learnable kernels, restricting expressiveness and performance. In this work, we propose Flexformer, a flexible linear Transformer that learns attention kernels in a fully data-driven manner. Flexformer builds on random Fourier feature-based linear attention and treats spectral frequencies…
items.why_zh: 通过可学习注意力核突破固定核限制，在保持线性复杂度下提升长序列建模能力。
items.why_en: Learnable attention kernels overcome fixed-kernel limitations, enhancing long-sequence modeling with linear complexity.

items.title_zh: 校准引导的大语言模型压缩中输出空间分配成本的实证研究
items.title_en: Output-Space Allocation Costs for Calibration-Guided LLM Compression: An Empirical Study
items.summary_zh: 大语言模型的无训练压缩方法常使用校准数据指导压缩决策。ROCKET方法结合稀疏字典分解与多选择背包问题分配，其逐层分解基于输出重建目标，但使用权重空间的Frobenius误差作为MCKP分配成本。本文研究将分配成本与输出空间目标对齐是否能提升压缩模型保真度。在Qwen3-8B模型上以50%压缩率进行的实验表明，采用输出空间分配成本的ROCKET变体在多项任务上性能更优，验证了成本对齐的有效性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27785v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Training-free compression methods for large language models (LLMs) often use calibration data to guide compression decisions. ROCKET, a recent method combining sparse-dictionary factorization with multi-choice knapsack problem (MCKP) allocation, derives its per-layer factorization from an output reconstruction objective but uses weight-space Frobenius error as the MCKP allocation cost. We investigate whether aligning the allocation cost with the output-space objective improves compressed model fidelity. On Qwen3-8B at 50\% compression, our ROCK…
items.why_zh: 揭示校准压缩中成本函数对齐的重要性，为提升压缩模型保真度提供指导。
items.why_en: Highlights the importance of cost alignment in calibration-guided compression for better model fidelity.

items.title_zh: 面向高性能计算系统的可扩展知识蒸馏中教师-学生划分优化
items.title_en: Optimizing Teacher-Student Partitioning for Scalable Knowledge Distillation on HPC Systems
items.summary_zh: 知识蒸馏利用大型教师模型指导小型学生模型训练，广泛使用的TRL库对称地处理两者，未充分利用它们在内存占用和通信需求上的不对称性。本文提出一种面向HPC的知识蒸馏方法，高效解耦教师和学生的划分。该方法通过避免不必要的教师模型数据结构，实现了比TRL高达67%的每秒样本处理量提升，显著加速了蒸馏过程，适用于大规模高性能计算环境。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27797v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Knowledge Distillation (KD) enables training smaller student models under the guidance of larger teacher models, and the widely adopted TRL library implements it. Yet, TRL treats both models symmetrically, missing opportunities to exploit their pronounced asymmetry in memory footprint, and communication requirements. This paper presents an HPC-aware methodology for KD that decouples teacher and student partitioning efficiently. Our approach achieves up to 67% higher samples-per-second than TRL by avoiding unnecessary teacher-model data structur…
items.why_zh: 利用教师-学生不对称性优化HPC上的知识蒸馏，大幅提升训练吞吐量。
items.why_en: Exploits teacher-student asymmetry to optimize KD on HPC, significantly boosting training throughput.

items.title_zh: 面向流量矩阵预测的参数高效量子启发快速权重编程器
items.title_en: Parameter-Efficient Quantum-Inspired Fast Weight Programmers for Traffic-Matrix Forecasting
items.summary_zh: 流量矩阵捕获网络范围的源-目的需求，对流量工程至关重要，但在在线网络控制的内存、更新和训练预算约束下，准确的全矩阵预测仍具挑战。本文研究紧凑的量子启发循环模型能否在无需专用图、Transformer或扩散模块的情况下提供有效的流量矩阵预测。作者改进了门控量子启发Kolmogorov-Arnold网络快速权重编程器，在多个真实网络数据集上实现了与复杂模型相当或更优的预测精度，同时参数更少、效率更高。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27821v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Traffic matrices (TMs) capture network-wide origin-destination demand and are central to traffic engineering, yet accurate whole-matrix forecasting remains challenging when prediction must be performed under the memory, update, and training-budget constraints of online network control. This paper investigates whether compact quantum-inspired recurrent models can provide effective TM forecasts without relying on dedicated graph, transformer, or diffusion modules. We adapt gated quantum-inspired Kolmogorov-Arnold network fast-weight programmers (…
items.why_zh: 提出轻量级量子启发模型，在资源受限下实现高效准确的流量矩阵预测。
items.why_en: Proposes lightweight quantum-inspired models for efficient and accurate traffic-matrix forecasting under resource constraints.

items.title_zh: Hippocampus-DETR：基于海马体建模的显式记忆目标检测框架
items.title_en: Hippocampus-DETR: An Explicit Memory Object Detection Framework Based on Hippocampus Modeling
items.summary_zh: 本文针对当前目标检测模型缺乏显式记忆机制的问题，提出Hippocampus-DETR，一种基于生物海马体记忆建模的新型检测框架。该框架将海马记忆网络模块HipNet集成到DETR架构中，系统模拟了海马亚区（包括内嗅皮层、齿状回、CA3、CA1和下托）的解剖结构和功能组织。通过这一设计，Hippocampus-DETR实现了模式分离等功能，在多个目标检测基准上取得了优于现有方法的性能，尤其擅长处理遮挡和外观变化。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27831v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This paper addresses the lack of explicit memory mechanisms in current object detection models and proposes Hippocampus-DETR, a novel detection framework based on biological hippocampal memory modeling. This framework integrates a hippocampal memory network module, HipNet, into the DETR architecture and systematically simulates the anatomical structure and functional organization of hippocampal subregions, including the entorhinal cortex, dentate gyrus, CA3, CA1, and subiculum. Through this design, Hippocampus-DETR realizes pattern separation,…
items.why_zh: 首次将生物海马体记忆机制引入目标检测，显式记忆提升模型对遮挡和变化的鲁棒性。
items.why_en: First to introduce biological hippocampal memory into object detection, enhancing robustness to occlusion and variation.

items.title_zh: WattLayer：正确分层以估计神经网络推理能耗
items.title_en: WattLayer: Get Layers Right to Estimate Inference Energy of Neural Networks
items.summary_zh: 人工智能的广泛采用引发了对能耗的日益关注，但目前缺乏标准化的方法来准确估计AI推理能耗，尤其是跨不同任务和架构。本文提出一种任务无关的逐层能耗估计模型WattLayer。该模型在包含超过10万层、295种神经网络架构的大规模数据集上进行了评估，覆盖3种广泛使用的任务和3种不同硬件平台。实验结果表明，WattLayer能够以高精度预测推理能耗，为绿色AI提供了实用工具。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27841v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The widespread adoption of Artificial Intelligence (AI) has led to increasing concerns about energy consumption, yet there is a lack of standardized methodologies to accurately estimate AI inference energy consumption, particularly across various tasks and architectures. In this study, we propose a task independent, layer-wise energy estimation model for AI architectures. Our model is evaluated on a large dataset of more than 100,000 layers for 295 neural network architectures across 3 widely-used tasks and 3 distinct hardware platforms. Our ap…
items.why_zh: 提供标准化、高精度的逐层能耗估计方法，助力绿色AI发展。
items.why_en: Provides a standardized, accurate layer-wise energy estimation method to support green AI.

items.title_zh: GNBAN：面向大规模实体集长时预测的图神经基注意力网络
items.title_en: GNBAN: Graph Neural Basis Attention Networks for Long-Horizon Forecasting over Large Entity Sets
items.summary_zh: 零售层级底部的需求预测需要预测跨产品、商店和地区的数万个相关长时序列。现代系统必须扩展到海量目录，捕获共享需求动态，并保持可解释性。经典统计方法需要为每个序列单独建模，难以大规模管理；深度自回归模型随着联合状态增长到数万维度而难以处理；最近的图基预测器虽能捕获跨实体相关性，但可扩展性有限。本文提出GNBAN，一种图神经基注意力网络，通过结合图神经网络和注意力机制，在保持可解释性的同时实现了对大规模实体集的高效长时预测。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27863v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Demand forecasting at the bottom of a retail hierarchy requires predicting tens of thousands of correlated long-horizon series across products, stores, and regions. Modern systems must scale across massive catalogs, capture shared demand dynamics, and remain interpretable enough to be trusted. Classical statistical methods need a separate model per series and are hard to manage at scale; deep autoregressive models struggle as the joint state grows to tens of thousands of dimensions; and recent graph-based forecasters, while capturing cross-enti…
items.why_zh: 为大规模零售需求预测提供可扩展且可解释的解决方案，兼顾相关性和效率。
items.why_en: Offers a scalable and interpretable solution for large-scale retail demand forecasting, balancing correlation and efficiency.

items.title_zh: S²-VLA：状态空间引导的视觉-语言-动作模型用于长时程操作
items.title_en: S$^2$-VLA: State-Space Guided Vision-Language-Action Models for Long-Horizon Manipulation
items.summary_zh: 视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在机器人操作中表现出强大能力，但在长时程任务中由于累积误差传播，性能显著下降。该问题主要源于静态特征融合机制，即使用固定权重组合视觉、语言和动作表示，导致模型无法适应任务执行的不同阶段。为此，研究者提出S²-VLA框架，引入状态空间引导的自适应注意力机制，使模型能够根据当前任务状态动态调整特征融合权重。实验表明，该方法在长时程操作任务中显著优于现有VLA模型，有效缓解了误差累积问题。这一进展有望推动机器人在复杂、多步骤任务中的实际应用。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27872v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have demonstrated strong capabilities in robotic manipulation, but their performance degrades significantly in long-horizon tasks due to cumulative error propagation. This limitation largely arises from static feature fusion mechanisms that rely on fixed weights to combine visual, language, and action representations, preventing the model from adapting to different phases of task execution. To address this limitation, we propose S$^2$-VLA, a framework that introduces a State-Space Guided Adaptive Attention (S…
items.why_zh: 解决了VLA模型在长时程任务中的关键瓶颈，为机器人执行复杂多步骤操作提供了新思路。
items.why_en: Addresses a key bottleneck of VLA models in long-horizon tasks, offering a new approach for complex multi-step robotic manipulation.

items.title_zh: 历史文本命名实体识别的时间融合策略研究
items.title_en: A Study of Temporal Fusion Strategies for Named Entity Recognition in Historical Texts
items.summary_zh: 时间变化对历史文本中的命名实体识别（NER）构成独特挑战，因为实体的表面形式和显著性会随时间漂移。尽管语言模型在多种NLP任务中取得进展，但其在历时语境下推理时间性的能力仍然有限。本文系统研究了如何通过轻量级融合策略将时间元数据结构性地嵌入NER模型。实验采用了绝对和相对时间表示，并比较了多种融合方式。结果表明，适当的时间融合能显著提升历史文本NER性能，尤其对于随时间变化的实体。该研究为处理时间敏感的NLP任务提供了实用指导。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27881v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Temporal variation poses a unique challenge for named entity recognition (NER) in historical texts, where entities drift in surface form and salience across time. While language models (LMs) have made progress in various NLP tasks, their ability to reason about temporality, especially in diachronic contexts, remains limited or at least, questionable. In this paper, we systematically study how temporal metadata can be structurally embedded into NER models using a range of lightweight fusion strategies. We experiment with both absolute and relati…
items.why_zh: 为历史文本等时间敏感场景下的NER提供了有效的融合方法，有助于提升数字人文等领域的信息抽取能力。
items.why_en: Provides effective fusion methods for NER in time-sensitive contexts like historical texts, enhancing information extraction in digital humanities.

items.title_zh: 基于智能体AI的重识别：对移动微数据隐私的新兴可扩展威胁
items.title_en: Agentic AI-Powered Re-Identification: An Emerging, Scalable Threat to Mobility Microdata Privacy
items.summary_zh: 商业数据经纪人广泛收集细粒度位置数据，带来了公众尚未充分认识的重识别风险。以往研究表明移动轨迹具有高度独特性，原则上可从少量时空点识别个体，但这类攻击需要熟练分析师的大量手动工作，限制了实际规模。本可行性研究在真实环境中证明，智能体AI从根本上改变了这一局面：通过自主规划和执行重识别攻击，AI能够以极低成本大规模识别匿名移动数据中的个体。这揭示了移动微数据隐私面临的新威胁，并呼吁加强相关保护措施。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.27936v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The widespread collection of fine-grained location data by commercial data brokers creates a re-identification risk that is not widely recognised by the public. While prior research has established that mobility traces are highly unique and that individuals can, in principle, be identified from a handful of spatio-temporal points, such attacks have historically required significant manual effort from skilled analysts, limiting their practical scale. In this feasibility study, we demonstrate in a real world setting that agentic AI fundamentally…
items.why_zh: 揭示了智能体AI对移动数据隐私的颠覆性威胁，提醒公众和政策制定者关注匿名化数据的真实风险。
items.why_en: Reveals a disruptive threat to mobility data privacy from agentic AI, urging attention to the real risks of anonymized data.
